import settings\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.checkpoint import CheckpointStore\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.handoff import HandoffProtocol\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.intake import IntakeAgent\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import (\\\\\\\\n    IntakeResult,\\\\\\\\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\\\\\\\\n    QuotaEventRecord,\\\\\\\\n    RiskLevel,\\\\\\\\n    StageCheckpoint,\\\\\\\\n    StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n    TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n    TaskStatus,\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.permission_gate import PermissionGate\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.quota_router import AllQuotaExhaustedError, QuotaRouter\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.stage_executor import PermissionBlockedError, QuotaExhaustedError, StageExecutionError, StageExecutor\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.task_queue import TaskQueue, utcnow_iso\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass Harness:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Main scheduler that turns queued tasks into stage executions.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        db_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_DB_PATH,\\\\\\\\n        artifact_root: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ARTIFACT_DIR,\\\\\\\\n        intake_agent: Optional[IntakeAgent] = None,\\\\\\\\n        quota_router: Optional[QuotaRouter] = None,\\\\\\\\n        stage_executor: Optional[StageExecutor] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        self.db = HarnessDB(db_path)\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue = TaskQueue(self.db)\\\\\\\\n        self.handoff = HandoffProtocol(artifact_root)\\\\\\\\n        self.checkpoints = CheckpointStore(artifact_root)\\\\\\\\n        self.intake = intake_agent or IntakeAgent()\\\\\\\\n        self.router = quota_router or QuotaRouter()\\\\\\\\n        self.executor = stage_executor or StageExecutor()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def submit_task(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        description: str,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        title: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(description, goal=goal, verify_cmd=verify_cmd)\\\\\\\\n        if title:\\\\\\\\n            intake = replace(intake, title=title)\\\\\\\\n        return self.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def submit_intake(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        intake: IntakeResult,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.create_task(\\\\\\\\n            title=intake.title,\\\\\\\\n            description=intake.description,\\\\\\\\n            goal=intake.goal,\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=intake.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\n            complexity=intake.complexity,\\\\\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\\\\\n            status=status,\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\\\\\n        return task\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def run_once(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\n        await self._recover_paused_quota_tasks()\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.pick_next_runnable_task()\\\\\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if self.task_queue.count_stages(task.task_id) == 0:\\\\\\\\n            await self._plan_missing_stages(task)\\\\\\\\n            task = self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id) or task\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n        if stage is None:\\\\\\\\n            await self._finish_task(task)\\\\\\\\n            return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        await self._run_stage(task, stage)\\\\\\\\n        return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def run_forever(self, poll_interval_sec: int = settings.HARNESS_POLL_INTERVAL_SEC) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\n            task = await self.run_once()\\\\\\\\n            if task is None:\\\\\\\\n                await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_sec)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def status_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\\\\\n        report: list[dict[str, object]] = []\\\\\\\\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks():\\\\\\\\n            report.append(\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.title,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.status.value,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.priority,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"complexity\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.complexity,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"working_dir\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.working_dir,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n                        {\\\\\\\\n                            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.stage_type,\\\\\\\\n                            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.status.value,\\\\\\\\n                            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assigned_model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_model,\\\\\\\\n                            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retry_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.retry_count,\\\\\\\\n                        }\\\\\\\\n                        for stage in self.task_queue.list_stages(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n                    ],\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        return report\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def inspect_task(self, task_id: str) -> dict[str, object]:\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\\\\\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\\\\\n            raise KeyError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task not found: {task_id}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        stages = self.task_queue.list_stages(task_id)\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.title,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.description,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"goal\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.goal,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"verify_cmd\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.status.value,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.priority,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"complexity\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.complexity,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"working_dir\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.working_dir,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.created_at,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"updated_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.updated_at,\\\\\\\\n            },\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.stage_type,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model_role\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.model_role,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.status.value,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assigned_model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_model,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assigned_provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_provider,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"handoff_doc_path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.handoff_doc_path,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"result_summary\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.result_summary,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retry_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.retry_count,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"verify_cmd\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"metadata\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.metadata,\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\\\\\n            ],\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"permission_requests\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"request_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.request_id,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"action\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.action,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"risk_level\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.risk_level.value,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"decision\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.decision,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"voters\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.voters,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"decided_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.decided_at,\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\\\\\n                for item in self.task_queue.list_permission_requests(stage.stage_id)\\\\\\\\n            ],\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"checkpoints\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n                asdict(checkpoint) for checkpoint in self.checkpoints.list_for_task(task_id)\\\\\\\\n            ],\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def pause_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def resume_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\\\\\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\\\\\n            raise KeyError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task not found: {task_id}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        if task.status in {TaskStatus.DONE, TaskStatus.FAILED}:\\\\\\\\n            raise ValueError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Cannot resume task in terminal status {task.status.value}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def quota_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\\\\\n        snapshots = self.router.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\\\\\n        return [\\\\\\\\n            {\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.provider.value,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.email,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.remaining_percent,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.reset_at_readable,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time_until_reset_hours\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": round(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 1),\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n            for snapshot in snapshots\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def _plan_missing_stages(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PLANNING)\\\\\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(task.description, goal=task.goal, verify_cmd=task.verify_cmd)\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def _recover_paused_quota_tasks(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks(TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA):\\\\\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n            if stage is None:\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\n            if self.router.can_run_stage(task, stage):\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\\\\\\\\n                    QuotaEventRecord(\\\\\\\\n                        event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\n                        provider=stage.assigned_provider or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                        account_email=None,\\\\\\\\n                        event_type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"recovered\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                        details={\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id},\\\\\\\\n                        created_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def _run_stage(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            if not stage.assigned_model or not stage.assigned_provider:\\\\\\\\n                choice = self.router.select_model(task, stage)\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.assign_stage_model(stage.stage_id, choice.model, choice.provider)\\\\\\\\n                stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            previous = self.task_queue.list_completed_stages(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n            handoff_path = self.handoff.write_handoff(task, stage, previous)\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.mark_stage_running(stage.stage_id, str(handoff_path))\\\\\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            result = await self.executor.execute(stage, str(handoff_path), task.working_dir)\\\\\\\\n            if stage.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\\\\\\\\n                verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(stage.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\\\\\\\\n                if verification.returncode != 0:\\\\\\\\n                    raise StageExecutionError(verification.stderr.strip() or verification.stdout.strip() or stage.verify_cmd)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            self.handoff.save_stage_output(task, stage, result)\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.complete_stage(\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_5\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_5\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota-aware model routing.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport yaml\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import ModelChoice, StageRecord, TaskRecord\\\\\\\\nfrom models.quota_manager import QuotaManager, QuotaSnapshot\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass AllQuotaExhaustedError(RuntimeError):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Raised when no configured candidate model is currently usable.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaRouter:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Select a model using role preferences, availability, and quota heuristics.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        quota_manager: Optional[QuotaManager] = None,\\\\\\\\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\\\\\\\\n        min_remaining_pct: int = settings.HARNESS_MIN_QUOTA_PCT,\\\\\\\\n        enable_llm_selector: bool = True,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        self.catalog_path = Path(catalog_path)\\\\\\\\n        self.quota_manager = quota_manager or QuotaManager()\\\\\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\\\\\n        self.min_remaining_pct = min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\n        self.enable_llm_selector = enable_llm_selector\\\\\\\\n        self.catalog = self._load_catalog()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _load_catalog(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n        with open(self.catalog_path, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\\\\\n            return yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def models_for_role(self, role: str) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\n        roles = self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"roles\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\n        configured = roles.get(role)\\\\\\\\n        if configured:\\\\\\\\n            return list(configured)\\\\\\\\n        return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def get_model_info(self, model: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n        return dict(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).get(model, {}))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def chat2api_id(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return the chat2api model ID for a catalog model name.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        info = self.get_model_info(model)\\\\\\\\n        return info.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", model)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def list_available_models(self) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return catalog model names whose chat2api_id is live.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            live_ids = set(self.chat_client.list_models())\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\n        if not live_ids:\\\\\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\n        return [\\\\\\\\n            name\\\\\\\\n            for name in self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\n            if self.chat2api_id(name) in live_ids\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def can_run_stage(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> bool:\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            self.select_model(task, stage, quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot, available_models=available_models)\\\\\\\\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError:\\\\\\\\n            return False\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def select_model(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\n        quotas = quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else self.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\\\\\n        available = set(available_models or self.list_available_models())\\\\\\\\n        eligible = self._eligible_candidates(self.models_for_role(stage.model_role), quotas, available)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if not eligible:\\\\\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if self.enable_llm_selector:\\\\\\\\n            llm_choice = self._select_with_llm(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\\\\\n            if llm_choice is not None:\\\\\\\\n                return llm_choice\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return self._fallback_select(task, stage, eligible)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _eligible_candidates(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        candidates: list[str],\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\n        available: set[str],\\\\\\\\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]]:\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]] = []\\\\\\\\n        for model in candidates:\\\\\\\\n            if model not in available:\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\n            provider = self.get_model_info(model).get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            if not provider:\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            provider_snapshots = [\\\\\\\\n                snapshot\\\\\\\\n                for snapshot in quotas\\\\\\\\n                if snapshot.provider.value == provider and snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\n            if provider_snapshots:\\\\\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, max(provider_snapshots, key=self._score_snapshot)))\\\\\\\\n            elif provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, None))\\\\\\\\n        return eligible\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _select_with_llm(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice | None:\\\\\\\\n        selector_model = self._pick_selector_model()\\\\\\\\n        if selector_model is None:\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        prompt = self._build_selection_prompt(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            raw = self.chat_client.chat(\\\\\\\\n                model=selector_model,\\\\\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\\\\\n                system=(\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"You are code-orchestra's model router. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return compact JSON with fields model, provider, account, reason.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(raw)\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        chosen_model = parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        if not isinstance(chosen_model, str):\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        eligible_models = {model: (provider, snapshot) for model, provider, snapshot in eligible}\\\\\\\\n        selected = eligible_models.get(chosen_model)\\\\\\\\n        if selected is None:\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        provider, snapshot = selected\\\\\\\\n        if snapshot is not None:\\\\\\\\n            requested_account = parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            if isinstance(requested_account, str) and requested_account and requested_account != snapshot.email:\\\\\\\\n                alternative = next(\\\\\\\\n                    (\\\\\\\\n                        quota\\\\\\\\n                        for quota in quotas\\\\\\\\n                        if quota.provider.value == provider\\\\\\\\n                        and quota.email == requested_account\\\\\\\\n                        and quota.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                    None,\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                if alternative is not None:\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = alternative\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\n            model=chosen_model,\\\\\\\\n            provider=provider,\\\\\\\\n            account_email=snapshot.email if snapshot is not None else None,\\\\\\\\n            reason=str(parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"llm_selector\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _fallback_select(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\n        best_choice: ModelChoice | None = None\\\\\\\\n        best_score: float | None = None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        for role_index, (model, provider, snapshot) in enumerate(eligible):\\\\\\\\n            role_bonus = max(0, 40 - role_index * 10)\\\\\\\\n            if snapshot is not None:\\\\\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_snapshot(snapshot)\\\\\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\\\\\n                    account_email=snapshot.email,\\\\\\\\n                    reason=(\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}%, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_provider_without_snapshot(provider)\\\\\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\\\\\n                    account_email=None,\\\\\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, provider={provider}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            if best_score is None or total_score > best_score:\\\\\\\\n                best_score = total_score\\\\\\\\n                best_choice = choice\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if best_choice is None:\\\\\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        return best_choice\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _pick_selector_model(self) -> str | None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Pick the cheapest available model to use as the LLM selector.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        Returns the *chat2api_id* since the selector call goes directly to chat2api.\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        preferred = (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude-haiku-4-5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gemini-3.1-pro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-5.4-codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        available = set(self.list_available_models())\\\\\\\\n        for model in preferred:\\\\\\\\n            if model in available:\\\\\\\\n                return self.chat2api_id(model)\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _build_selection_prompt(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\\\\\n        lines = [\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task: {task.title}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Description: {task.description}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Complexity: {task.complexity}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Eligible models:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\n        for model, provider, snapshot in eligible:\\\\\\\\n            if snapshot is None:\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account=n/a | remaining=n/a | reset_in=n/a\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account={snapshot.email} | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% | reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n        if quotas:\\\\\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota snapshot:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\n            for snapshot in quotas:\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- {snapshot.provider.value}:{snapshot.email} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n        lines.extend(\\\\\\\\n            [\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Prefer use-it-or-lose-it quota, but keep role fit.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                'Respond as JSON: {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}',\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _score_snapshot(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot) -> float:\\\\\\\\n        waste_bonus = 0.0\\\\\\\\n        if snapshot.time_until_reset_hours <= 6:\\\\\\\\n            waste_bonus = snapshot.remaining_percent * (6 - max(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 0)) / 6\\\\\\\\n        safety_bonus = 15.0 if snapshot.remaining_percent >= 40 else 0.0\\\\\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent + waste_bonus + safety_bonus\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _score_provider_without_snapshot(self, provider: str) -> float:\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n            return 85.0\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n            return 70.0\\\\\\\\n        return 50.0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_6\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' models/codex/account.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_6\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' models/codex/account.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"from __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\nimport os\\\\\\\\nimport subprocess\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom . import auth\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCODEX_DIR = Path.home() / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nACCOUNTS_DIR = CODEX_DIR / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH = ACCOUNTS_DIR / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"accounts.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nCODEX_AUTH_PATH = CODEX_DIR / int\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.email,\\\\\\\\n @classmethod\\\\\\\\n    def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CodexAccount\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        return cls(\\\\\\\\n            email=data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n            access_token=data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n            refresh_token=data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n int(time.time())),\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass AccountIndex:\\\\\\\\n    accounts: List[str]\\\\\\\\n    active_account: str\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": list(self.accounts),\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"active_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.active_account,\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    @classmethod\\\\\\\\n    def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"AccountIndex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        accounts = data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or []\\\\\\\\n        active = data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"active_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        return cls(accounts=list(accounts), active_account=active)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _ensure_accounts_dir() -> None:\\\\\\\\n    ACCOUNTS_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _account_path(email: str) -> Path:\\\\\\\\n    return ACCOUNTS_DIR / f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{email}.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _read_json(path: Path) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n    with path.open(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\n        return json.load(f)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _atomic_write_json(path: Path, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:\\\\\\\\n    _ensure_accounts_dir()\\\\\\\\n    tmp_path = path.with_suffix(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".tmp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    with tmp_path.open(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\n        json.dump(data, f, indent=2, sort_keys=True)\\\\\\\\n        f.flush()\\\\\\\\n        os.fsync(f.fileno())\\\\\\\\n    os.replace(tmp_path, path)\\\\\\\\n    os.chmod(path, 0o600)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _load_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\\\\\n    if not ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH.exists():\\\\\\\\n        return AccountIndex(accounts=[], active_account=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    return AccountIndex.from_dict(_read_json(ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _save_index(index: AccountIndex) -> None:\\\\\\\\n    _atomic_write_json(ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH, index.to_dict())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_account_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\\\\\n    return _load_index()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_active_email() -> str:\\\\\\\\n    return _load_index().active_account\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef list_accounts() -> List[str]:\\\\\\\\n    return _load_index().accounts\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef load_account(email: str) -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\\\\\n    if not path.exists():\\\\\\\\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Account not found: {email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    return CodexAccount.from_dict(_read_json(path))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef load_all_accounts() -> List[CodexAccount]:\\\\\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\\\\\n    accounts: List[CodexAccount] = []\\\\\\\\n    for email in index.accounts:\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            accounts.append(load_account(email))\\\\\\\\n        except FileNotFoundError:\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\n    return accounts\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef save_account(account: CodexAccount) -> None:\\\\\\\\n    _atomic_write_json(_account_path(account.email), account.to_dict())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef add_account(\\\\\\\\n    email: str,\\\\\\\\n    tokens: Dict[str, Any],\\\\\\\\n    account_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    plan_type: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    quota_snapshot: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    disabled: Optional[bool] = None,\\\\\\\\n    set_active: bool = False,\\\\\\\\n    update_last_used: bool = True,\\\\\\\\n) -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\n    if not tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or not tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Missing access_token or refresh_token for account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    now = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\n    existing = None\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        existing = load_account(email)\\\\\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError:\\\\\\\\n        pass\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    account = CodexAccount(\\\\\\\\n        email=email,\\\\\\\\n        access_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        refresh_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        id_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        account_id=account_id or (existing.account_id if existing else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n        plan_type=plan_type or (existing.plan_type if existing else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else (existing.quota_snapshot if existing else {}),\\\\\\\\n        disabled=existing.disabled if (existing and disabled is None) else bool(disabled),\\\\\\\\n        created_at=existing.created_at if existing else now,\\\\\\\\n        last_used=now if update_last_used else (existing.last_used if existing else now),\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    save_account(account)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\\\\\n    if email not in index.accounts:\\\\\\\\n        index.accounts.append(email)\\\\\\\\n    if set_active:\\\\\\\\n        index.active_account = email\\\\\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return account\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_active_account() -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\\\\\n    if not index.active_account:\\\\\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No active account set\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    return load_account(index.active_account)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef remove_account(email: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\\\\\n    if email in index.accounts:\\\\\\\\n        index.accounts.remove(email)\\\\\\\\n    if index.active_account == email:\\\\\\\\n        index.active_account = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\\\\\n    if path.exists():\\\\\\\\n        path.unlink()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef import_current_account() -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\n    auth_data = auth.read_codex_auth()\\\\\\\\n    tokens = auth_data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"tokens\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\n    if not tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or not tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Current auth.json is missing access_token or refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    info = auth.extract_account_info(tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"), tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    email = info.email\\\\\\\\n    if not email:\\\\\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Unable to extract email from current auth.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    account_id = tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or info.account_id\\\\\\\\n    plan_type = info.plan_type or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    account = add_account(\\\\\\\\n        email=email,\\\\\\\\n        tokens={\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n        },\\\\\\\\n        account_id=account_id,\\\\\\\\n        plan_type=plan_type,\\\\\\\\n        set_active=True,\\\\\\\\n        update_last_used=True,\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return account\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _is_codex_running() -> bool:\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        result = subprocess.run(\\\\\\\\n            [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pgrep\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"],\\\\\\\\n            check=False,\\\\\\\\n            stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,\\\\\\\\n            stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        return result.returncode == 0\\\\\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError:\\\\\\\\n        return False\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef refresh_account_tokens(account: CodexAccount, force: bool = False) -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\n    tokens = {\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": account.access_token,\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": account.refresh_token,\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": account.id_token,\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": account.account_id,\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        new_tokens = auth.ensure_fresh_tokens(tokens, force=force)\\\\\\\\n    except auth.AuthError as exc:\\\\\\\\n        account.disabled = True\\\\\\\\n        save_account(account)\\\\\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Failed to refresh tokens for {account.email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") from exc\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if new_tokens != tokens:\\\\\\\\n        info = auth.extract_account_info(new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"), new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        if info.account_id:\\\\\\\\n            account.account_id = info.account_id\\\\\\\\n        if info.plan_type:\\\\\\\\n            account.plan_type = info.plan_type\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        account.access_token = new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or account.access_token\\\\\\\\n        account.refresh_token = new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or account.refresh_token\\\\\\\\n        account.id_token = new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or account.id_token\\\\\\\\n        account.last_used = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\n        save_account(account)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return account\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef set_active_account(email: str) -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\\\\\n    if email not in index.accounts:\\\\\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Account not found: {email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if _is_codex_running():\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: codex appears to be running; restart it after switching.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        current_auth = auth.read_codex_auth()\\\\\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError:\\\\\\\\n        current_auth = None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if current_auth:\\\\\\\\n        tokens = current_auth.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"tokens\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\n        info = auth.extract_account_info(tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"), tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        current_email = info.email\\\\\\\\n        if current_email and current_email != email:\\\\\\\\n            add_account(\\\\\\\\n                email=current_email,\\\\\\\\n                tokens={\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n                },\\\\\\\\n                account_id=tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or info.account_id,\\\\\\\\n                plan_type=info.plan_type or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                set_active=False,\\\\\\\\n                update_last_used=True,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    target = load_account(email)\\\\\\\\n    if target.disabled:\\\\\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Account is disabled: {email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    target = refresh_account_tokens(target)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    auth.write_codex_auth(\\\\\\\\n        {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": target.access_token,\\\\\\\\n \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": target.account_id,\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    index.active_account = email\\\\\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    target.last_used = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\n    save_account(target)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return questions: list[str] = ClarificationQuestion:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    key: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    prompt: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    default: Optional[str] = ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    model: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    provider: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account_email: Optional[str] = PermissionDecision:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    risk_level: RiskLevel\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    decision: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reason: list[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ModelVote\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass StageExecutionResult:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_id: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    status: StageStatus\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    raw_output: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    summary: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    files_changed: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    error: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    duration_sec: float = 0.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    token_used: int = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass StageCheckpoint:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_id: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    task_id: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    model_used: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    handoff_doc_path: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    files_modified: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    retry_count: int = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    paused_reason: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    partial_output: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass ModelVote:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    model: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    vote: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reason: VoteResult:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    decision: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    votes: list[ModelVote] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    unanimous: bool = False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    needs_escalation: bool = False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_16\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/db.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_16\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/db.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SQLite schema and connection helpers for the harness.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport sqlite3\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom contextlib import contextmanager\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Iterator\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSCHEMA = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nPRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    task_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    title TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    description TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    goal TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    complexity TEXT DEFAULT 'medium',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    priority INTEGER DEFAULT 50,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    working_dir TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stages (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    task_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(task_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_type TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_order INTEGER NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    model_role TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    assigned_model TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    assigned_provider TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    handoff_doc_path TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    result_summary TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    token_used INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    duration_sec REAL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    started_at TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    finished_at TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    metadata TEXT DEFAULT '{}'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_requests (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    request_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stages(stage_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    action TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    context TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    risk_level TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    decision TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    voters TEXT DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    decided_at TEXT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quota_events (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    event_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    provider TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account_email TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    event_type TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    details TEXT DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    created_at TEXT NOT NULL\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_status_priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ON tasks(status, priority DESC, created_at ASC);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_order\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ON stages(task_id, stage_order ASC);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ON stages(task_id, status, stage_order ASC);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass HarnessDB:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Small wrapper around a SQLite database file.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, db_path: str | Path) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.db_path = Path(db_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.db_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.initialize()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def initialize(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.executescript(SCHEMA)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @contextmanager\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def connect(self) -> Iterator[sqlite3.Connection]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            yield conn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.commit()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.rollback()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        finally:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.close()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_17\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/task_queue.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_17\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/task_queue.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SQLite-backed task and stage queue.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport uuid\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Iterable, Optional\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PlannedStage,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    QuotaEventRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    RiskLevel,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    StageStatus,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    TaskStatus,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef utcnow_iso() -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass TaskQueue:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CRUD layer for tasks, stages, and audit tables.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, db: HarnessDB) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.db = db\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def create_task(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        title: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        description: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        complexity: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"medium\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.PENDING,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        record = TaskRecord(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            task_id=task_id or uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            title=title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            description=description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            goal=goal,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            complexity=complexity,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            status=status,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            created_at=now,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            updated_at=now,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                INSERT INTO tasks (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    task_id, title, description, goal, verify_cmd, complexity,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    priority, status, working_dir, created_at, updated_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.task_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.goal,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.complexity,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.priority,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.status.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.created_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.updated_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return record\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def list_tasks(self, status: Optional[TaskStatus] = None) -> list[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        query = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        params: tuple[object, ...] = ()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if status is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" WHERE status = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            params = (status.value,)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(query, params).fetchall()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return [self._row_to_task(row) for row in rows]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def pick_next_runnable_task(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                SELECT * FROM tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                WHERE status IN (?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ORDER BY\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    CASE status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        WHEN ? THEN 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        WHEN ? THEN 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        ELSE 2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    END,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    priority DESC,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    created_at ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                LIMIT 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PLANNING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ).fetchone()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def update_task_status(self, task_id: str, status: TaskStatus) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (status.value, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def update_task_working_dir(self, task_id: str, working_dir: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET working_dir = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (working_dir, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def save_stages(self, task_id: str, stages: Iterable[PlannedStage]) -> list[StageRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        records: list[StageRecord] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for planned in stages:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                record = StageRecord(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    task_id=task_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_type=planned.stage_type,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_order=planned.stage_order,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n client in self.clients.values()), return_exceptions=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _invoke_model(self, stage_def: StageDefinition, prompt: str) -> fail_fast\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def ensure_servers_running(config_path: str, timeout: float = 3.0) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n required servers are healthy. Return True if all ok.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\udd0d Checking ACP Server Status...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    report = await check_all_servers(config_path, timeout)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if report.unhealthy_count == 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2705 All {report.total_servers} servers are healthy!\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u274c SOME SERVERS ARE UNREACHABLE!\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for server in report.servers:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not server.healthy:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            err = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ({server.error})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if server.error else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  - {server.base_url} is DOWN{err}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nPlease start the required servers (e.g. using scripts/run_*_server.py).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef get_available_workflows() -> list[Path]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return a list of workflow YAML files.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    workflows_dir = Path(__file__).parent.parent / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"workflows\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not workflows_dir.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return sorted(workflows_dir.glob(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*.yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # 1. Check Servers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    servers_ok = await ensure_servers_running(args.config, args.timeout)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not servers_ok:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"               ORCHESTRA MULTI-AGENT CLI\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60 + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # 2. Select Workflow\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    workflows = get_available_workflows()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not workflows:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n directory.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n user.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n
