3. Get Task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    task_description = args.task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nEnter task description (press Enter twice to finish):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                line = input()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    break\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(line)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCanceled by user.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task_description = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u274c Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # 4. print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ude80 Starting Pipeline Execution...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    executor = CLIExecutor(pipeline_def, args.config)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n base_url.rstrip(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.timeout = timeout\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self._model_map = self._load_model_map(catalog_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @staticmethod\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _load_model_map(catalog_path: str | Path) -> dict[str, str]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as fh:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                catalog = yaml.safe_load(fh) or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except (OSError, yaml.YAMLError):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            name: info[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for name, info in catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).items()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in info\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def resolve_model(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n system:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n messages.append({\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"role\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": prompt})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        payload = self._post_json(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/v1/chat/completions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.resolve_model(model),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n },\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return payload[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"choices\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"][0][\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"][\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _get_json(self, path: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        req = request.Request(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{self.base_url}{path}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", method=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"GET\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with request.urlopen(req, timeout=self.timeout) as response:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return json.loads(response.read().decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _post_json(self, path: str, body: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        data = json.dumps(body).encode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        req = request.Request(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{self.base_url}{path}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            data=data,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n plan\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nImplement in three slices.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSlice 1: keep routing pure, but add an explicit Codex account activation step before Codex execution so feasibility checks do not mutate global auth state.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSlice 2: add a nohup-style daemon manager with PID metadata, stale PID detection, hidden worker entrypoint, and SIGTERM-driven graceful shutdown around `run_forever`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSlice 3: add centralized logging plus JSONL stage events, then build `dashboard` aggregates from DB state and event history instead of mixing metrics into ad hoc CLI output.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nBaseline before changes: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -q` => `21 passed`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Current Stage Instructions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nImplement all three features end-to-end. Keep the Codex account switch separate from pure model selection, prefer a portable nohup-style daemon path for tests, and add focused tests as each slice lands so the final `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v` run is stable.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Verification\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nRun: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ artifacts/563b7352a8d94c82bf26787efb827fc0/01_plan_output.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"# Output: plan\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Summary\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nImplement the robustness work in three slices with tests after each slice:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n1. Codex account rotation\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Keep `QuotaRouter.select_model()` side-effect free so `can_run_stage()` remains safe.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Extend routing to choose the best Codex account among all Codex quota snapshots using the existing use-it-or-lose-it scoring, and preserve the chosen `account_email` in `ModelChoice`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add a separate activation step before Codex execution that calls `models.codex.account.set_active_account()` only when the chosen Codex account differs from the current active account.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Log/surface the selected account in the routing reason and stage telemetry.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n2. Daemon lifecycle\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add a small daemon manager module instead of embedding process control directly in CLI branches.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Use a detached `subprocess.Popen(..., start_new_session=True)` worker for a portable nohup-style background process.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add `daemon start`, `daemon stop`, and `daemon status` CLI subcommands plus a hidden worker command that runs `Harness.run_forever()`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Persist daemon metadata in a PID file, detect stale PID files, and install a `SIGTERM` handler that lets the current iteration finish and exits cleanly.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n3. Logging, monitoring, and dashboard\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add one centralized logging setup for the harness CLI/daemon path.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Emit structured JSONL events for stage start, completion, retry, quota pause, permission pause, and failure.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Compute dashboard aggregates from the DB plus the JSONL event stream: task counts by status, stage counts by status, total/average duration, total token usage, and execution error rate.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Include daemon state, recent failures, and quota/permission pause counts in the dashboard output.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## File Targets\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/quota_router.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/main.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/stage_executor.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/task_queue.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `config/settings.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- New modules are likely justified for daemon/process management and telemetry aggregation.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Test Plan\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add router tests for multi-account Codex selection and no-side-effect feasibility checks.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add harness/main tests for Codex account activation before execution.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add daemon tests for PID lifecycle, stale PID detection, and stop/status behavior.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add telemetry/dashboard tests for JSONL event emission and aggregate summaries.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Final verification: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Baseline\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCurrent baseline is green: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -q` passed with `21 passed`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_49\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agent_message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u89c4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u5212\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u7ed3\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u679c\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u5df2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u843d\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u5230 -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota-aware model routing.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport yaml\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import ModelChoice, StageRecord, TaskRecord\\\\\\\\nfrom models.quota_manager import QuotaManager, QuotaSnapshot\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass AllQuotaExhaustedError(RuntimeError):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Raised when no configured candidate model is currently usable.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaRouter:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Select a model using role preferences, availability, and quota heuristics.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        quota_manager: Optional[QuotaManager] = None,\\\\\\\\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\\\\\\\\n        min_remaining_pct: int = settings.HARNESS_MIN_QUOTA_PCT,\\\\\\\\n        enable_llm_selector: bool = True,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        self.catalog_path = Path(catalog_path)\\\\\\\\n        self.quota_manager = quota_manager or QuotaManager()\\\\\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\\\\\n        self.min_remaining_pct = min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\n        self.enable_llm_selector = enable_llm_selector\\\\\\\\n        self.catalog = self._load_catalog()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _load_catalog(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n        with open(self.catalog_path, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\\\\\n            return yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def models_for_role(self, role: str) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\n        roles = self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"roles\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\n        configured = roles.get(role)\\\\\\\\n        if configured:\\\\\\\\n            return list(configured)\\\\\\\\n        return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def get_model_info(self, model: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n        return dict(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).get(model, {}))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def chat2api_id(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return the chat2api model ID for a catalog model name.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        info = self.get_model_info(model)\\\\\\\\n        return info.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", model)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def list_available_models(self) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return catalog model names whose chat2api_id is live.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            live_ids = set(self.chat_client.list_models())\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\n        if not live_ids:\\\\\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\n        return [\\\\\\\\n            name\\\\\\\\n            for name in self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\n            if self.chat2api_id(name) in live_ids\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def can_run_stage(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> bool:\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            self.select_model(task, stage, quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot, available_models=available_models)\\\\\\\\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError:\\\\\\\\n            return False\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def select_model(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\n        quotas = quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else self.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\\\\\n        available = set(available_models or self.list_available_models())\\\\\\\\n        eligible = self._eligible_candidates(self.models_for_role(stage.model_role), quotas, available)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if not eligible:\\\\\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if self.enable_llm_selector:\\\\\\\\n            llm_choice = self._select_with_llm(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\\\\\n            if llm_choice is not None:\\\\\\\\n                return llm_choice\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return self._fallback_select(task, stage, eligible)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _eligible_candidates(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        candidates: list[str],\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\n        available: set[str],\\\\\\\\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]]:\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]] = []\\\\\\\\n        for model in candidates:\\\\\\\\n            if model not in available:\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\n            provider = self.get_model_info(model).get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            if not provider:\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            provider_snapshots = [\\\\\\\\n                snapshot\\\\\\\\n                for snapshot in quotas\\\\\\\\n                if snapshot.provider.value == provider and snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\n            if provider_snapshots:\\\\\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, max(provider_snapshots, key=self._score_snapshot)))\\\\\\\\n            elif provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, None))\\\\\\\\n        return eligible\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _select_with_llm(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice | None:\\\\\\\\n        selector_model = self._pick_selector_model()\\\\\\\\n        if selector_model is None:\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        prompt = self._build_selection_prompt(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            raw = self.chat_client.chat(\\\\\\\\n                model=selector_model,\\\\\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\\\\\n                system=(\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"You are code-orchestra's model router. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return compact JSON with fields model, provider, account, reason.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(raw)\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        chosen_model = parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        if not isinstance(chosen_model, str):\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        eligible_models = {model: (provider, snapshot) for model, provider, snapshot in eligible}\\\\\\\\n        selected = eligible_models.get(chosen_model)\\\\\\\\n        if selected is None:\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        provider, snapshot = selected\\\\\\\\n        if snapshot is not None:\\\\\\\\n            requested_account = parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            if isinstance(requested_account, str) and requested_account and requested_account != snapshot.email:\\\\\\\\n                alternative = next(\\\\\\\\n                    (\\\\\\\\n                        quota\\\\\\\\n                        for quota in quotas\\\\\\\\n                        if quota.provider.value == provider\\\\\\\\n                        and quota.email == requested_account\\\\\\\\n                        and quota.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                    None,\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                if alternative is not None:\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = alternative\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\n            model=chosen_model,\\\\\\\\n            provider=provider,\\\\\\\\n            account_email=snapshot.email if snapshot is not None else None,\\\\\\\\n            reason=str(parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"llm_selector\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _fallback_select(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\n        best_choice: ModelChoice | None = None\\\\\\\\n        best_score: float | None = None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        for role_index, (model, provider, snapshot) in enumerate(eligible):\\\\\\\\n            role_bonus = max(0, 40 - role_index * 10)\\\\\\\\n            if snapshot is not None:\\\\\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_snapshot(snapshot)\\\\\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\\\\\n                    account_email=snapshot.email,\\\\\\\\n                    reason=(\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}%, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_provider_without_snapshot(provider)\\\\\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\\\\\n                    account_email=None,\\\\\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, provider={provider}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            if best_score is None or total_score > best_score:\\\\\\\\n                best_score = total_score\\\\\\\\n                best_choice = choice\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if best_choice is None:\\\\\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        return best_choice\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _pick_selector_model(self) -> str | None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Pick the cheapest available model to use as the LLM selector.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        Returns the *chat2api_id* since the selector call goes directly to chat2api.\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        preferred = (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude-haiku-4-5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gemini-3.1-pro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-5.4-codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        available = set(self.list_available_models())\\\\\\\\n        for model in preferred:\\\\\\\\n            if model in available:\\\\\\\\n                return self.chat2api_id(model)\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _build_selection_prompt(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\\\\\n        lines = [\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task: {task.title}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Eligible @classmethod\\\\\\\\n    def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CodexAccount\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        return cls(\\\\\\\\n int(time.time())),\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass AccountIndex:\\\\\\\\n    accounts: List[str]\\\\\\\\n    active_account: str\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": list(self.accounts),\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"active_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.active_account,\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    @classmethod\\\\\\\\n    def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"AccountIndex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        accounts = data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or []\\\\\\\\n        active = data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"active_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        return cls(accounts=list(accounts), active_account=active)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _ensure_accounts_dir() -> None:\\\\\\\\n    ACCOUNTS_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _account_path(email: str) -> Path:\\\\\\\\n    return ACCOUNTS_DIR / f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{email}.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _read_json(path: Path) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n    with path.open(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\n        return json.load(f)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _atomic_write_json(path: Path, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:\\\\\\\\n encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\n        json.dump(data, f, indent=2, sort_keys=True)\\\\\\\\n        f.flush()\\\\\\\\n        os.fsync(f.fileno())\\\\\\\\n    os.replace(tmp_path, path)\\\\\\\\n    os.chmod(path, 0o600)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _load_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\\\\\n    if not ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH.exists():\\\\\\\\n        return _load_index()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_active_email() -> str:\\\\\\\\n    return _load_index().active_account\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef list_accounts() -> List[str]:\\\\\\\\n    return _load_index().accounts\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef load_account(email: str) -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\\\\\n    if not path.exists():\\\\\\\\n        raise List[CodexAccount]:\\\\\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\\\\\n    accounts: List[CodexAccount] = []\\\\\\\\n    for email in index.accounts:\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            accounts.append(load_account(email))\\\\\\\\n        except FileNotFoundError:\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\n    return accounts\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef save_account(account: CodexAccount) -> None:\\\\\\\\n    _atomic_write_json(_account_path(account.email), account.to_dict())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef add_account(\\\\\\\\n    email: str,\\\\\\\\n    tokens: Dict[str, Any],\\\\\\\\n    account_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    plan_type: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    quota_snapshot: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    disabled: Optional[bool] = None,\\\\\\\\n    set_active: bool = False,\\\\\\\\n    update_last_used: bool = True,\\\\\\\\n) -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\n    if not tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or not tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Missing access_token or refresh_token for account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    now = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\n    existing = None\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        existing = load_account(email)\\\\\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError:\\\\\\\\n        pass\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    account = CodexAccount(\\\\\\\\n        email=email,\\\\\\\\n        access_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        refresh_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        id_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        account_id=account_id or (existing.account_id if existing else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n        plan_type=plan_type or (existing.plan_type if existing else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else (existing.quota_snapshot if existing else {}),\\\\\\\\n        disabled=existing.disabled if (existing and disabled is None) else bool(disabled),\\\\\\\\n        created_at=existing.created_at if existing else now,\\\\\\\\n        last_used=now if update_last_used else (existing.last_used if existing else now),\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    save_account(account)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\\\\\n    if email not in index.accounts:\\\\\\\\n        index.accounts.append(email)\\\\\\\\n    if set_active:\\\\\\\\n        index.active_account = email\\\\\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return account\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_active_account() -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\\\\\n    if not index.active_account:\\\\\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No active account set\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    return load_account(index.active_account)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef remove_account(email: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\n \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\\\\\n    if path.exists():\\\\\\\\n -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/stage_executor.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CLI-backed stage execution.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\nimport subprocess\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Awaitable, Callable, Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import PermissionDecision, StageExecutionResult, StageRecord, StageStatus\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.permission_gate import PermissionGate\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass CommandExecution:\\\\\\\\n    returncode: int\\\\\\\\n    stdout: str\\\\\\\\n    stderr: str\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nRunner = Callable[[list[str], str], Awaitable[CommandExecution]]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass StageExecutionError(RuntimeError):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Base stage execution error.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaExhaustedError(StageExecutionError):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Raised when the underlying provider reports quota exhaustion.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, provider: str, message: str, partial_output: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") -> None:\\\\\\\\n        super().__init__(message)\\\\\\\\n        self.provider = provider\\\\\\\\n        self.partial_output = partial_output\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass PermissionBlockedError(StageExecutionError):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Raised when an action is blocked by the permission gate.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, command: str, decision: PermissionDecision) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        super().__init__(decision.reason)\\\\\\\\n        self.command = command\\\\\\\\n        self.decision = decision\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass StageExecutor:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Execute planned stages via CLI backends or lightweight API calls.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    APPROVED_DECISIONS = {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"auto_approved\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model_approved\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user_approved\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\\\\\\\\n        permission_gate: Optional[PermissionGate] = None,\\\\\\\\n        runner: Optional[Runner] = None,\\\\\\\\n        codex_tier: str = settings.CODEX_TIER,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\\\\\n        self.permission_gate = permission_gate or PermissionGate()\\\\\\\\n        self.runner = runner or self._run_command\\\\\\\\n        self.codex_tier = codex_tier\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def execute(self, stage: StageRecord, handoff_doc_path: str, working_dir: str | None) -> StageExecutionResult:\\\\\\\\n        started_at = time.time()\\\\\\\\n        prompt = Path(handoff_doc_path).read_text(encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        provider = stage.assigned_provider or self._infer_provider(stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        cwd = working_dir or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat2api\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n            raw_output = await asyncio.to_thread(\\\\\\\\n                self.chat_client.chat,\\\\\\\\n                model=stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            duration = time.time() - started_at\\\\\\\\n            return StageExecutionResult(\\\\\\\\n                stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n                status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\\\\\n                raw_output=raw_output,\\\\\\\\n                summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\\\\\\\\n                duration_sec=duration,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n            return await self._run_github_ops(stage, prompt, cwd, started_at)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        command = self.build_command(stage, prompt, cwd)\\\\\\\\n        completed = await self._run_checked_command(\\\\\\\\n            command,\\\\\\\\n            cwd,\\\\\\\\n            context=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage={stage.stage_type} role={stage.model_role}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        combined_output = completed.stdout.strip() or completed.stderr.strip()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if self._looks_like_quota_exhaustion(completed.stdout, completed.stderr):\\\\\\\\n            raise QuotaExhaustedError(provider or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", combined_output, partial_output=completed.stdout)\\\\\\\\n        if completed.returncode != 0:\\\\\\\\n            raise StageExecutionError(combined_output or f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Stage failed with exit code {completed.returncode}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        duration = time.time() - started_at\\\\\\\\n        files_changed = self._list_changed_files(cwd)\\\\\\\\n        raw_output = self._normalize_output(completed.stdout, stage.assigned_provider)\\\\\\\\n        return StageExecutionResult(\\\\\\\\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n            status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\\\\\n            raw_output=raw_output,\\\\\\\\n            summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\\\\\\\\n            files_changed=files_changed,\\\\\\\\n            duration_sec=duration,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def build_command(self, stage: StageRecord, prompt: str, working_dir: str) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\n        provider = stage.assigned_provider or self._infer_provider(stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        model = stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n            return [\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-p\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--output-format\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stream-json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                model,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--allowedTools\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Edit,Read,Bash,Grep,Glob,Write\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                prompt,\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n            cmd = [\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exec\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-C\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                working_dir,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--full-auto\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                prompt,\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\n            return cmd\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"google\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n            return [\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gemini\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                model,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-p\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                prompt,\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\n        raise StageExecutionError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Unsupported provider for CLI execution: {provider}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def run_verify_cmd(self, verify_cmd: str, working_dir: str | None) -> CommandExecution:\\\\\\\\n        return await self._run_checked_command(\\\\\\\\n            [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bash\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-lc\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", verify_cmd],\\\\\\\\n            working_dir or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            context=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"verification command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            display_command=verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def _run_github_ops(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n        prompt: str,\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: str,\\\\\\\\n        started_at: float,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> StageExecutionResult:\\\\\\\\n        commands = [str(item) for item in stage.metadata.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"commands\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", [])]\\\\\\\\n        if not commands:\\\\\\\\n            summary = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"GitHub stage had no commands configured.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            return StageExecutionResult(\\\\\\\\n                stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n                status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\\\\\n                raw_output=summary,\\\\\\\\n                summary=summary,\\\\\\\\n                duration_sec=time.time() - started_at,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        outputs: list[str] = []\\\\\\\\n        for raw_command in commands:\\\\\\\\n            rendered = raw_command.format(\\\\\\\\n                summary=stage.result_summary or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                stage_type=stage.stage_type,\\\\\\\\n                working_dir=working_dir,\\\\\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            completed = await self._run_checked_command(\\\\\\\\n                [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bash\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-lc\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", rendered],\\\\\\\\n                working_dir,\\\\\\\\n                context=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github_ops stage={stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                display_command=rendered,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            if completed.returncode != 0:\\\\\\\\n                raise StageExecutionError(completed.stderr.strip() or completed.stdout.strip() or rendered)\\\\\\\\n            output = completed.stdout.strip() or completed.stderr.strip() or f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Executed: {rendered}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            outputs.append(output)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        raw_output = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(outputs).strip()\\\\\\\\n        return StageExecutionResult(\\\\\\\\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n            status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\\\\\n            raw_output=raw_output,\\\\\\\\n            summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\\\\\\\\n            files_changed=self._list_changed_files(working_dir),\\\\\\\\n            duration_sec=time.time() - started_at,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def _run_checked_command(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        command: list[str],\\\\\\\\n        cwd: str,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        context: str,\\\\\\\\n        display_command: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> CommandExecution:\\\\\\\\n        command_text = display_command or self._display_command(command)\\\\\\\\n        decision = await self.permission_gate.decide(\\\\\\\\n            command_text,\\\\\\\\n            context=context,\\\\\\\\n            available_models=self._safe_list_available_models(),\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        if decision.decision not in self.APPROVED_DECISIONS:\\\\\\\\n            raise PermissionBlockedError(command_text, decision)\\\\\\\\n        return await self.runner(command, cwd)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def _run_command(self, command: list[str], cwd: str) -> CommandExecution:\\\\\\\\n        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(\\\\\\\\n            *command,\\\\\\\\n            cwd=cwd,\\\\\\\\n            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,\\\\\\\\n            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        stdout, stderr = await process.communicate()\\\\\\\\n        return CommandExecution(\\\\\\\\n            returncode=process.returncode,\\\\\\\\n            stdout=stdout.decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"replace\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n            stderr=stderr.decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"replace\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _normalize_output(self, stdout: str, provider: Optional[str]) -> str:\\\\\\\\n        text = stdout.strip()\\\\\\\\n        if provider != \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" or not text:\\\\\\\\n            return text\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(text)\\\\\\\\n        except json.JSONDecodeError:\\\\\\\\n            return text\\\\\\\\n        if isinstance(parsed, dict):\\\\\\\\n            if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"output_text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in parsed and isinstance(parsed[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"output_text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"], str):\\\\\\\\n                return parsed[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"output_text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n            if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in parsed and isinstance(parsed[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"], str):\\\\\\\\n                return parsed[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        return text\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _summarize(self, text: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\n        cleaned = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(text.split())\\\\\\\\n        if len(cleaned) <= 280:\\\\\\\\n            return cleaned\\\\\\\\n        return cleaned[:277] + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_7\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/main.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_7\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/main.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Harness entry point and scheduler loop.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport argparse\\\\\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\nimport sys\\\\\\\\nimport uuid\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import asdict\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import replace\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.checkpoint import CheckpointStore\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.handoff import HandoffProtocol\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.intake import IntakeAgent\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import (\\\\\\\\n    IntakeResult,\\\\\\\\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\\\\\\\\n    QuotaEventRecord,\\\\\\\\n    RiskLevel,\\\\\\\\n    StageCheckpoint,\\\\\\\\n    StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n    TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n    TaskStatus,\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.permission_gate import PermissionGate\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.quota_router import AllQuotaExhaustedError, QuotaRouter\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.stage_executor import PermissionBlockedError, QuotaExhaustedError, StageExecutionError, StageExecutor\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.task_queue import TaskQueue, utcnow_iso\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass Harness:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Main scheduler that turns queued tasks into stage executions.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        db_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_DB_PATH,\\\\\\\\n        artifact_root: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ARTIFACT_DIR,\\\\\\\\n        intake_agent: Optional[IntakeAgent] = None,\\\\\\\\n        quota_router: Optional[QuotaRouter] = None,\\\\\\\\n        stage_executor: Optional[StageExecutor] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        self.db = HarnessDB(db_path)\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue = TaskQueue(self.db)\\\\\\\\n        self.handoff = HandoffProtocol(artifact_root)\\\\\\\\n        self.checkpoints = CheckpointStore(artifact_root)\\\\\\\\n        self.intake = intake_agent or IntakeAgent()\\\\\\\\n        self.router = quota_router or QuotaRouter()\\\\\\\\n        self.executor = stage_executor or StageExecutor()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def submit_task(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        description: str,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        title: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(description, goal=goal, verify_cmd=verify_cmd)\\\\\\\\n        if title:\\\\\\\\n            intake = replace(intake, title=title)\\\\\\\\n        return self.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def submit_intake(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        intake: IntakeResult,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.create_task(\\\\\\\\n            title=intake.title,\\\\\\\\n            description=intake.description,\\\\\\\\n            goal=intake.goal,\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=intake.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\n            complexity=intake.complexity,\\\\\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\\\\\n            status=status,\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\\\\\n        return task\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def run_once(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\n        await self._recover_paused_quota_tasks()\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.pick_next_runnable_task()\\\\\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if self.task_queue.count_stages(task.task_id) == 0:\\\\\\\\n            await self._plan_missing_stages(task)\\\\\\\\n            task = self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id) or task\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n        if stage is None:\\\\\\\\n            await self._finish_task(task)\\\\\\\\n            return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        await self._run_stage(task, stage)\\\\\\\\n        return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def run_forever(self, poll_interval_sec: int = settings.HARNESS_POLL_INTERVAL_SEC) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\n            task = await self.run_once()\\\\\\\\n            if task is None:\\\\\\\\n                await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_sec)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def status_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\\\\\n        report: list[dict[str, object]] = []\\\\\\\\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks():\\\\\\\\n            report.append(\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.title,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.status.value,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.priority,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"complexity\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.complexity,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"working_dir\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.working_dir,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n                        {\\\\\\\\n                            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.stage_type,\\\\\\\\n                            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.status.value,\\\\\\\\n                            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assigned_model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_model,\\\\\\\\n                            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retry_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.retry_count,\\\\\\\\n                        }\\\\\\\\n                        for stage in self.task_queue.list_stages(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n                    ],\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        return report\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def inspect_task(self, task_id: str) -> dict[str, object]:\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\\\\\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\\\\\n            raise KeyError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task not found: {task_id}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        stages = self.task_queue.list_stages(task_id)\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.title,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.description,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"goal\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.goal,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"verify_cmd\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.status.value,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.priority,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"complexity\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.complexity,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"working_dir\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.working_dir,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.created_at,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"updated_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.updated_at,\\\\\\\\n            },\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.stage_type,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model_role\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.model_role,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.status.value,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assigned_model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_model,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assigned_provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_provider,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"handoff_doc_path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.handoff_doc_path,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"result_summary\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.result_summary,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retry_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.retry_count,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"verify_cmd\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"metadata\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.metadata,\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\\\\\n            ],\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"permission_requests\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"request_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.request_id,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"action\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.action,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"risk_level\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.risk_level.value,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"decision\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.decision,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"voters\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.voters,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"decided_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.decided_at,\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\\\\\n                for item in self.task_queue.list_permission_requests(stage.stage_id)\\\\\\\\n            ],\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"checkpoints\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n                asdict(checkpoint) for checkpoint in self.checkpoints.list_for_task(task_id)\\\\\\\\n            ],\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def pause_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def resume_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\\\\\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\\\\\n            raise KeyError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task not found: {task_id}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        if task.status in {TaskStatus.DONE, TaskStatus.FAILED}:\\\\\\\\n            raise ValueError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Cannot resume task in terminal status {task.status.value}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def quota_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\\\\\n        snapshots = self.router.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\\\\\n        return [\\\\\\\\n            {\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.provider.value,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.email,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.remaining_percent,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.reset_at_readable,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time_until_reset_hours\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": round(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 1),\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n            for snapshot in snapshots\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def _plan_missing_stages(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PLANNING)\\\\\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(task.description, goal=task.goal, verify_cmd=task.verify_cmd)\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def _recover_paused_quota_tasks(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks(TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA):\\\\\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n            if stage is None:\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\n            if self.router.can_run_stage(task, stage):\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\\\\\\\\n                    QuotaEventRecord(\\\\\\\\n                        event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\n                        provider=stage.assigned_provider or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                        account_email=None,\\\\\\\\n                        event_type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"recovered\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                        details={\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id},\\\\\\\\n                        created_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def _run_stage(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            if not stage.assigned_model or not stage.assigned_provider:\\\\\\\\n                choice = self.router.select_model(task, stage)\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.assign_stage_model(stage.stage_id, choice.model, choice.provider)\\\\\\\\n                stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            previous = self.task_queue.list_completed_stages(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n            handoff_path = self.handoff.write_handoff(task, stage, previous)\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.mark_stage_running(stage.stage_id, str(handoff_path))\\\\\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            result = await self.executor.execute(stage, str(handoff_path), task.working_dir)\\\\\\\\n            if stage.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\\\\\\\\n                verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(stage.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\\\\\\\\n                if verification.returncode != 0:\\\\\\\\n                    raise StageExecutionError(verification.stderr.strip() or verification.stdout.strip() or stage.verify_cmd)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            self.handoff.save_stage_output(task, stage, result)\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.complete_stage(\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_8\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '260,520p' harness/main.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_8\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '260,520p' harness/main.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"            self.task_queue.complete_stage(\\\\\\\\n                stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n                result_summary=result.summary,\\\\\\\\n                token_used=result.token_used,\\\\\\\\n                duration_sec=result.duration_sec,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            self.checkpoints.delete(task.task_id, stage.stage_id)\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            if self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id) is None:\\\\\\\\n                await self._finish_task(task)\\\\\\\\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError:\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA)\\\\\\\\n        except QuotaExhaustedError as exc:\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=stage.retry_count + 1)\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA)\\\\\\\\n            checkpoint = StageCheckpoint(\\\\\\\\n                stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n                task_id=task.task_id,\\\\\\\\n                model_used=stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                handoff_doc_path=stage.handoff_doc_path or str(self.handoff.handoff_path(task, stage)),\\\\\\\\n                files_modified=[],\\\\\\\\n                retry_count=stage.retry_count + 1,\\\\\\\\n                paused_reason=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota_exhausted\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                paused_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\n                partial_output=exc.partial_output,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            self.checkpoints.save(checkpoint)\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\\\\\\\\n                QuotaEventRecord(\\\\\\\\n                    event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\n                    provider=exc.provider,\\\\\\\\n                    account_email=None,\\\\\\\\n                    event_type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exhausted\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    details={\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id},\\\\\\\\n                    created_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        except PermissionBlockedError as exc:\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=stage.retry_count)\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.log_permission_request(\\\\\\\\n                PermissionRequestRecord(\\\\\\\\n                    request_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\n                    stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n                    action=exc.command,\\\\\\\\n                    context=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task={task.task_id} stage={stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    risk_level=exc.decision.risk_level,\\\\\\\\n                    decision=exc.decision.decision,\\\\\\\\n                    voters=[\\\\\\\\n                        {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": vote.model, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"vote\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": vote.vote, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": vote.reason}\\\\\\\\n                        for vote in exc.decision.votes\\\\\\\\n                    ],\\\\\\\\n                    decided_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        except StageExecutionError as exc:\\\\\\\\n            retry_count = stage.retry_count + 1\\\\\\\\n            if retry_count > settings.MAX_RETRIES:\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.fail_stage(stage.stage_id, result_summary=str(exc), retry_count=retry_count)\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=retry_count)\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def _finish_task(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        if task.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\\\\\\\\n            verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(task.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\\\\\\\\n            if verification.returncode != 0:\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)\\\\\\\\n                return\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.DONE)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\\\\\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Autonomous multi-LLM harness\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", required=True)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    submit = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"submit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Submit a task into the harness queue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Override generated title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--goal\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Acceptance goal\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--verify-cmd\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Verification command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", type=int, default=50)\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--working-dir\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task working directory\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    chat = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Interactive requirement clarification\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", nargs=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Initial task description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", type=int, default=50)\\\\\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--working-dir\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task working directory\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    inspect = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inspect\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Show a task in detail\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    inspect.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pause = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pause\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Pause a task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    pause.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    resume = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"resume\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Resume a task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    resume.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Show quota snapshot\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"run-once\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Run one scheduling iteration\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Show queued tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    return parser\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync def _prompt_user_approval(command: str, context: str) -> bool | None:\\\\\\\\n    if not sys.stdin.isatty():\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Permission request for command: {command}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    if context:\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Context: {context}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    answer = await asyncio.to_thread(input, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Allow? [y/N]: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    lowered = answer.strip().lower()\\\\\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"y\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"yes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}:\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"no\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}:\\\\\\\\n        return False\\\\\\\\n    return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef build_cli_harness() -> Harness:\\\\\\\\n    chat_client = None\\\\\\\\n    permission_gate = PermissionGate(user_approver=_prompt_user_approval)\\\\\\\\n    stage_executor = StageExecutor(chat_client=chat_client, permission_gate=permission_gate)\\\\\\\\n    quota_router = QuotaRouter(chat_client=stage_executor.chat_client)\\\\\\\\n    return Harness(quota_router=quota_router, stage_executor=stage_executor)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _read_multiline_description() -> str:\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Describe the task. Press Enter twice to finish:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    lines: list[str] = []\\\\\\\\n    while True:\\\\\\\\n        line = input()\\\\\\\\n        if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\\\\\n            break\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(line)\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _run_chat_submission(harness: Harness, description: str | None, priority: int, working_dir: str | None) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\n    initial_description = description or _read_multiline_description()\\\\\\\\n    if not initial_description:\\\\\\\\n        raise ValueError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    base = harness.intake.plan_task(initial_description)\\\\\\\\n    questions = harness.intake.generate_questions(initial_description, base.complexity)\\\\\\\\n    answers: dict[str, str] = {}\\\\\\\\n    for question in questions:\\\\\\\\n        suffix = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" [{question.default}]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if question.default else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        response = input(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{question.prompt}{suffix}: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n        answers[question.key] = response or (question.default or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    intake = harness.intake.apply_answers(initial_description, answers)\\\\\\\\n    return harness.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync def _main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\n    harness = build_cli_harness()\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"submit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        task = harness.submit_task(\\\\\\\\n            args.description,\\\\\\\\n            title=args.title,\\\\\\\\n            goal=args.goal,\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=args.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\n            priority=args.priority,\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=args.working_dir,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        print(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        task = _run_chat_submission(harness, args.description, args.priority, args.working_dir)\\\\\\\\n        print(json.dumps({\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.title}, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"run-once\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        task = await harness.run_once()\\\\\\\\n        print(task.task_id if task else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"idle\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        for item in harness.status_report():\\\\\\\\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inspect\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        print(json.dumps(harness.inspect_task(args.task_id), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pause\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        harness.pause_task(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\n        print(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"resume\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        harness.resume_task(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\n        print(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n        for item in harness.quota_report():\\\\\\\\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\n    return 1\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef main() -> None:\\\\\\\\n    parser = build_parser()\\\\\\\\n    args = parser.parse_args()\\\\\\\\n    raise SystemExit(asyncio.run(_main_async(args)))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n    main()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_9\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash snapshot.time_until_reset_hours <= 6:\\\\\\\\n            waste_bonus = snapshot.remaining_percent * (6 - max(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 0)) / 6\\\\\\\\n        safety_bonus = 15.0 if snapshot.remaining_percent >= 40 else 0.0\\\\\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent + waste_bonus + safety_bonus\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _score_provider_without_snapshot(self, provider: str) -> float:\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n            return 85.0\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n account.refresh_token\\\\\\\\n        account.id_token = new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or account.id_token\\\\\\\\n        account.last_used = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\n        save_account(account)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return account\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef set_active_account(email: str) -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\\\\\n    if email not in index.accounts:\\\\\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Account not found: {email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if _is_codex_running():\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: codex appears to be running; restart it after switching.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        current_auth = auth.read_codex_auth()\\\\\\\\n CLI \\\\u5b50\\\\u547d\\\\u4ee4\\\\u8be5\\\\u843d\\\\u5728\\\\u54ea\\\\u4e00\\\\u5c42\\\\u3002\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_13\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash
