models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_13\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nUnified Quota Manager for Google (Antigravity) and Codex accounts.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nSmart switching algorithm \\\\u2014 optimizes for:\\\\\\\\n1. WASTE PREVENTION: Use quota before it expires (don't let resets waste unused quota)\\\\\\\\n2. TASK SAFETY: Ensure >40% remaining when starting new tasks\\\\\\\\n3. CONTINUITY: Avoid unnecessary switching (anti-thrash)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nUnified scoring formula per account:\\\\\\\\n  score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nWhere:\\\\\\\\n  - remaining: current remaining % (0-100)\\\\\\\\n  - waste_urgency: remaining \\\\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\n    \\\\u2192 Boosts accounts with quota about to be lost on reset\\\\\\\\n  - safety_bonus: +15 if remaining > 40% (enough for a full task)\\\\\\\\n  - inertia: +5 for current account (avoid switching for marginal gains)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nSwitch when best candidate's score exceeds current by > 10 points.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\\\\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\\\\\\\\nfrom enum import Enum\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import load_account as load_codex_account\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import list_accounts as list_codex_accounts\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import set_active_account as set_active_codex_account\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import get_active_email as get_active_codex_email\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.quota import fetch_quota as fetch_codex_quota\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import load_account as load_google_account\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import list_accounts as list_google_accounts_fn\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import set_active_account as set_active_google_account\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import get_active_email as get_active_google_email\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import save_account as save_google_account\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.oauth import ensure_fresh_token as ensure_fresh_google_token\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.quota import fetch_account_quota as fetch_google_quota\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass Provider(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\n    CODEX = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    GOOGLE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"google\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaSnapshot:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Point-in-time quota snapshot for an account.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    provider: Provider\\\\\\\\n    email: str\\\\\\\\n    account_id: str\\\\\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\\\\\n    used_percent: int\\\\\\\\n    reset_at: int                    # Unix timestamp\\\\\\\\n    reset_at_readable: str           # Human-readable\\\\\\\\n    time_until_reset_hours: float\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\n    def remaining_percent(self) -> int:\\\\\\\\n        return max(0, 100 - self.used_percent)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\n    def is_exhausted(self) -> bool:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"True if quota is essentially depleted (>= 95%).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        return self.used_percent >= 95\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\n    def is_fresh(self) -> bool:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"True if just reset or will reset very soon.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        return self.remaining_percent >= 90 or self.time_until_reset_hours < 0.5\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{self.email:<40} {self.plan_type:<6} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[{self.used_percent:>3}%] \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{self.time_until_reset_hours:>5.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass SwitchDecision:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Result of quota analysis and switching decision.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    should_switch: bool\\\\\\\\n    reason: str\\\\\\\\n    target_email: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    target_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\\\\\n    current_email: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    current_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\\\\\n        if not self.should_switch:\\\\\\\\n            return f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"STAY on {self.current_email} ({self.current_remaining}% remaining) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SWITCH {self.current_email} \\\\u2192 {self.target_email} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"({self.current_remaining}% \\\\u2192 {self.target_remaining}%) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaManager:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    Intelligent quota manager for multi-provider, multi-account systems.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    Optimizes for three goals (in priority order):\\\\\\\\n    1. WASTE PREVENTION \\\\u2014 Use quota before it resets (don't lose unused quota)\\\\\\\\n    2. TASK SAFETY \\\\u2014 Prefer accounts with >40% for new tasks\\\\\\\\n    3. CONTINUITY \\\\u2014 Avoid unnecessary mid-session switching\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    Uses a unified scoring formula:\\\\\\\\n      score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD = 40              # Prefer accounts > 40% for new tasks\\\\\\\\n    FRESH_QUOTA_THRESHOLD = 90              # Consider \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fresh\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if >= 90%\\\\\\\\n    WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS = 6                  # Boost accounts resetting within 6h\\\\\\\\n    SAFETY_BONUS = 15                       # Score bonus for accounts > 40%\\\\\\\\n    INERTIA_BONUS = 5                       # Score bonus for staying on current\\\\\\\\n    HEALTHY_INERTIA = 20                    # Extra inertia when current is healthy (>40%)\\\\\\\\n    SWITCH_THRESHOLD = 10                   # Minimum score improvement to switch\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, check_interval_minutes: int = 60):\\\\\\\\n        self.check_interval_minutes = check_interval_minutes\\\\\\\\n        self.last_check_time = 0\\\\\\\\n        self.account_reset_times: dict[str, int] = {}  # email -> reset_at timestamp\\\\\\\\n        self.last_switch_time = 0\\\\\\\\n        self.state_file = Path.home() / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota_manager_state.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self._load_state()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _load_state(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Load persistent state (reset times).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if self.state_file.exists():\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                with open(self.state_file) as f:\\\\\\\\n                    data = json.load(f)\\\\\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {k: int(v) for k, v in data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).items()}\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _save_state(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Save persistent state.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self.state_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\n        with open(self.state_file, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\n            json.dump(\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.account_reset_times},\\\\\\\\n                f,\\\\\\\\n                indent=2,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def fetch_all_quotas(self) -> list[QuotaSnapshot]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Fetch quota for all accounts (both providers).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot] = []\\\\\\\\n        now = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Codex accounts\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            for email in list_codex_accounts():\\\\\\\\n                try:\\\\\\\\n                    account = load_codex_account(email)\\\\\\\\n                    quota = fetch_codex_quota(account.access_token, account.account_id)\\\\\\\\n                    reset_at = quota.weekly_reset_at\\\\\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (reset_at - now) / 3600.0  # hours\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\\\\\n                        provider=Provider.CODEX,\\\\\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\\\\\n                        account_id=account.account_id,\\\\\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.plan_type or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                        used_percent=quota.weekly_used_percent,\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at=reset_at,\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = reset_at\\\\\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Codex quota for {email}: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Codex accounts: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Google accounts\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            accounts = list_google_accounts_fn()\\\\\\\\n            # Google's list_accounts returns Account objects directly\\\\\\\\n            for account in accounts:\\\\\\\\n                try:\\\\\\\\n                    # Refresh token if expired\\\\\\\\n                    account.token = ensure_fresh_google_token(account.token)\\\\\\\\n                    save_google_account(account)\\\\\\\\n                    quota, _ = fetch_google_quota(account.token.access_token, account.project_id)\\\\\\\\n                    # Google quotas are per-model, find the max usage\\\\\\\\n                    max_used_percent = 0\\\\\\\\n                    max_reset_at = 0\\\\\\\\n                    for model_quota in quota.models:\\\\\\\\n                        used = 100 - (model_quota.percentage or 0)\\\\\\\\n                        if used > max_used_percent:\\\\\\\\n                            max_used_percent = used\\\\\\\\n                        if model_quota.reset_time:\\\\\\\\n                            try:\\\\\\\\n                                reset_ts = int(datetime.fromisoformat(\\\\\\\\n                                    model_quota.reset_time.replace(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Z\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"+00:00\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n                                ).timestamp())\\\\\\\\n                                if reset_ts > max_reset_at:\\\\\\\\n                                    max_reset_at = reset_ts\\\\\\\\n                            except Exception:\\\\\\\\n                                pass\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                    if max_reset_at == 0:\\\\\\\\n                        max_reset_at = now + 86400  # Default 24h if unknown\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (max_reset_at - now) / 3600.0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\\\\\n                        provider=Provider.GOOGLE,\\\\\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\\\\\n                        account_id=account.project_id or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.subscription_tier or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                        used_percent=max_used_percent,\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at=max_reset_at,\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(max_reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = max_reset_at\\\\\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Google quota for {account.email}: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Google accounts: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        self._save_state()\\\\\\\\n        return sorted(snapshots, key=lambda s: (-s.remaining_percent, s.time_until_reset_hours))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _score_account(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot, is_current: bool = False) -> float:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        Unified scoring formula for an account.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        Components:\\\\\\\\n        - remaining: base value (0-100)\\\\\\\\n        - waste_urgency: boosts accounts with quota about to expire\\\\\\\\n          = remaining \\\\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\n          Only applies when hours_to_reset < WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\n        - safety_bonus: +15 for accounts with >40% (can sustain a full task)\\\\\\\\n        - inertia: +5 for current account (anti-thrash)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        Examples:\\\\\\\\n        - Account A: 50% remaining, 2h until reset, current\\\\\\\\n          \\\\u2192 50 + 50*(6-2)/6 + 15 + 5 = 50 + 33.3 + 15 + 5 = 103.3\\\\\\\\n        - Account B: 80% remaining, 120h until reset, not current\\\\\\\\n          \\\\u2192 80 + 0 + 15 + 0 = 95\\\\\\\\n        - Account C: 20% remaining, 1h until reset, not current\\\\\\\\n          \\\\u2192 20 + 20*(6-1)/6 + 0 + 0 = 20 + 16.7 + 0 = 36.7\\\\\\\\n        \\\\u2192 Switch to A (use its 50% before reset), even though B has more remaining\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        remaining = snapshot.remaining_percent\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_14\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/models.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_14\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/models.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Core data structures for the autonomous harness.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\\\\\nfrom enum import Enum\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass TaskStatus(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\n    PENDING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    PLANNING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"planning\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"executing\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    PAUSED_QUOTA = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"paused_quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    PAUSED_PERMISSION = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"paused_permission\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    DONE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"done\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    FAILED = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass StageStatus(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\n    PENDING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    RUNNING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"running\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    DONE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"done\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    FAILED = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    SKIPPED = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"skipped\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass RiskLevel(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\n    SAFE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"safe\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    MODERATE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"moderate\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    DANGEROUS = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dangerous\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    CRITICAL = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"critical\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass PlannedStage:\\\\\\\\n    stage_type: str\\\\\\\\n    stage_order: int\\\\\\\\n    model_role: str\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\n    metadata: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\n    task_id: str\\\\\\\\n    title: str\\\\\\\\n    description: str\\\\\\\\n    goal: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    complexity: str\\\\\\\\n    priority: int\\\\\\\\n    status: TaskStatus\\\\\\\\n    working_dir: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    created_at: str\\\\\\\\n    updated_at: str\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass StageRecord:\\\\\\\\n    stage_id: str\\\\\\\\n    task_id: str\\\\\\\\n    stage_type: str\\\\\\\\n    stage_order: int\\\\\\\\n    model_role: str\\\\\\\\n    assigned_model: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    assigned_provider: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    status: StageStatus\\\\\\\\n    handoff_doc_path: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    result_summary: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    token_used: int\\\\\\\\n    duration_sec: float\\\\\\\\n    started_at: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    finished_at: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    retry_count: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\n    metadata: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass PermissionRequestRecord:\\\\\\\\n    request_id: str\\\\\\\\n    stage_id: str\\\\\\\\n    action: str\\\\\\\\n    context: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    risk_level: RiskLevel\\\\\\\\n    decision: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    voters: list[dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n    decided_at: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaEventRecord:\\\\\\\\n    event_id: str\\\\\\\\n    provider: str\\\\\\\\n    account_email: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    event_type: str\\\\\\\\n    details: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\\\\\\\\n    created_at: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass IntakeResult:\\\\\\\\n    title: str\\\\\\\\n    description: str\\\\\\\\n    complexity: str\\\\\\\\n field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass ClarificationQuestion:\\\\\\\\n    key: str\\\\\\\\n    prompt: str\\\\\\\\n    default: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\n    required: bool = False\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\n    model: str\\\\\\\\n    provider: str\\\\\\\\n    account_email: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\n    reason: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass PermissionDecision:\\\\\\\\n    risk_level: RiskLevel\\\\\\\\n    decision: str\\\\\\\\n    reason: str\\\\\\\\n    requires_voting: bool = False\\\\\\\\n    requires_user: bool = False\\\\\\\\n    votes: list[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ModelVote\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass StageExecutionResult:\\\\\\\\n    stage_id: str\\\\\\\\n    status: StageStatus\\\\\\\\n    raw_output: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    summary: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    files_changed: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n    error: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\n    duration_sec: float = 0.0\\\\\\\\n    token_used: int = 0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass StageCheckpoint:\\\\\\\\n    stage_id: str\\\\\\\\n    task_id: str\\\\\\\\n    model_used: str\\\\\\\\n    handoff_doc_path: str\\\\\\\\n    files_modified: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n    retry_count: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    paused_reason: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota_exhausted\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    paused_at: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    partial_output: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass ModelVote:\\\\\\\\n    model: str\\\\\\\\n    vote: str\\\\\\\\n    reason: str\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\nclass VoteResult:\\\\\\\\n    decision: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\n    votes: list[ModelVote] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n    unanimous: bool = False\\\\\\\\n    needs_escalation: bool = False\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_15\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash harness/task_queue.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_15\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,320p' harness/task_queue.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SQLite-backed task and stage queue.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\nimport uuid\\\\\\\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Iterable, Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import (\\\\\\\\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\\\\\\\\n    PlannedStage,\\\\\\\\n    QuotaEventRecord,\\\\\\\\n    RiskLevel,\\\\\\\\n    StageRecord,\\\\\\\\n    StageStatus,\\\\\\\\n    TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\n    TaskStatus,\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef utcnow_iso() -> str:\\\\\\\\n    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass TaskQueue:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CRUD layer for tasks, stages, and audit tables.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, db: HarnessDB) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        self.db = db\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def create_task(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        title: str,\\\\\\\\n        description: str,\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n        complexity: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"medium\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.PENDING,\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n        task_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\\\\\n        record = TaskRecord(\\\\\\\\n            task_id=task_id or uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\n            title=title,\\\\\\\\n            description=description,\\\\\\\\n            goal=goal,\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\n            complexity=complexity,\\\\\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\\\\\n            status=status,\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\\\\\n            created_at=now,\\\\\\\\n            updated_at=now,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                INSERT INTO tasks (\\\\\\\\n                    task_id, title, description, goal, verify_cmd, complexity,\\\\\\\\n                    priority, status, working_dir, created_at, updated_at\\\\\\\\n                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                (\\\\\\\\n                    record.task_id,\\\\\\\\n                    record.title,\\\\\\\\n                    record.description,\\\\\\\\n                    record.goal,\\\\\\\\n                    record.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\n                    record.complexity,\\\\\\\\n                    record.priority,\\\\\\\\n                    record.status.value,\\\\\\\\n                    record.working_dir,\\\\\\\\n                    record.created_at,\\\\\\\\n                    record.updated_at,\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        return record\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\\\\\\\\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def list_tasks(self, status: Optional[TaskStatus] = None) -> list[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\n        query = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        params: tuple[object, ...] = ()\\\\\\\\n        if status is not None:\\\\\\\\n            query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" WHERE status = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            params = (status.value,)\\\\\\\\n        query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(query, params).fetchall()\\\\\\\\n        return [self._row_to_task(row) for row in rows]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def pick_next_runnable_task(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                SELECT * FROM tasks\\\\\\\\n                WHERE status IN (?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\n                ORDER BY\\\\\\\\n                    CASE status\\\\\\\\n                        WHEN ? THEN 0\\\\\\\\n                        WHEN ? THEN 1\\\\\\\\n                        ELSE 2\\\\\\\\n                    END,\\\\\\\\n                    priority DESC,\\\\\\\\n                    created_at ASC\\\\\\\\n                LIMIT 1\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                (\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PLANNING.value,\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n            ).fetchone()\\\\\\\\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def update_task_status(self, task_id: str, status: TaskStatus) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                (status.value, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def update_task_working_dir(self, task_id: str, working_dir: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET working_dir = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                (working_dir, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def save_stages(self, task_id: str, stages: Iterable[PlannedStage]) -> list[StageRecord]:\\\\\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\\\\\n        records: list[StageRecord] = []\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            for planned in stages:\\\\\\\\n                record = StageRecord(\\\\\\\\n                    stage_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\n                    task_id=task_id,\\\\\\\\n                    stage_type=planned.stage_type,\\\\\\\\n                    stage_order=planned.stage_order,\\\\\\\\n                    model_role=planned.model_role,\\\\\\\\n                    assigned_model=None,\\\\\\\\n                    assigned_provider=None,\\\\\\\\n                    status=StageStatus.PENDING,\\\\\\\\n                    handoff_doc_path=None,\\\\\\\\n                    result_summary=None,\\\\\\\\n                    token_used=0,\\\\\\\\n                    duration_sec=0.0,\\\\\\\\n                    started_at=None,\\\\\\\\n                    finished_at=None,\\\\\\\\n                    retry_count=0,\\\\\\\\n                    verify_cmd=planned.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\n                    metadata=dict(planned.metadata),\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    INSERT INTO stages (\\\\\\\\n                        stage_id, task_id, stage_type, stage_order, model_role,\\\\\\\\n                        assigned_model, assigned_provider, status, handoff_doc_path,\\\\\\\\n                        result_summary,      json.dumps(record.metadata),\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                records.append(record)\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                (now, task_id),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        return records\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def count_stages(self, task_id: str) -> int:\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM stages WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\\\\\\\\n        return int(row[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def get_stage(self, stage_id: str) -> Optional[StageRecord]:\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM stages WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", (stage_id,)).fetchone()\\\\\\\\n        return self._row_to_stage(row) if row else None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def list_stages(self, task_id: str) -> list[StageRecord]:\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM stages WHERE task_id = ? ORDER BY stage_order ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                (task_id,),\\\\\\\\n            ).fetchall()\\\\\\\\n        return [self._row_to_stage(row) for row in rows]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def list_completed_stages(self, task_id: str) -> list[StageRecord]:\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                SELECT * FROM stages\\\\\\\\n                WHERE task_id = ? AND status = ?\\\\\\\\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\\\\\\\\n                LIMIT 1\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n model: str, provider: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n StageStatus.DONE.value,\\\\\\\\n                    result_summary,\\\\\\\\n                    token_used,\\\\\\\\n                    duration_sec,\\\\\\\\n                    utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\n                    stage_id,\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def skip_stage(self, stage_id: str, *, result_summary: Optional[str] = None) -> None:\\\\\\\\n )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_18\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_18\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '260,520p' models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        # Waste urgency: boost accounts with quota about to be lost on reset\\\\\\\\n        waste_urgency = 0.0\\\\\\\\n        hours = snapshot.time_until_reset_hours\\\\\\\\n        if 0 < hours <= self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS and remaining > 0:\\\\\\\\n            waste_urgency = remaining * (self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS - hours) / self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Safety bonus: prefer accounts that can sustain a full task\\\\\\\\n        safety = self.SAFETY_BONUS if remaining > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD else 0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Inertia: preference for staying on current account\\\\\\\\n        # Extra inertia when healthy \\\\u2014 don't switch between two good accounts\\\\\\\\n        inertia = 0\\\\\\\\n        if is_current:\\\\\\\\n            inertia = self.INERTIA_BONUS\\\\\\\\n            if remaining > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD:\\\\\\\\n                inertia += self.HEALTHY_INERTIA\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return remaining + waste_urgency + safety + inertia\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _is_fresh_reset(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot) -> bool:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Check if account just reset or is in immediate post-reset window.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.FRESH_QUOTA_THRESHOLD\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def analyze_and_decide(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        current_email: str,\\\\\\\\n        current_snapshot: Optional[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\n        all_snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\n    ) -> SwitchDecision:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        Analyze quota situation and decide whether to switch accounts.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        Uses unified scoring that balances:\\\\\\\\n        1. Waste prevention (use expiring quota before it's lost)\\\\\\\\n        2. Task safety (prefer >40% for new tasks)\\\\\\\\n        3. Continuity (inertia for current account)\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if not current_snapshot:\\\\\\\\n            # No current account info \\\\u2014 pick the best available\\\\\\\\n            if all_snapshots:\\\\\\\\n                scored = [(s, self._score_account(s)) for s in all_snapshots]\\\\\\\\n                best, best_score = max(scored, key=lambda x: x[1])\\\\\\\\n                return SwitchDecision(\\\\\\\\n                    should_switch=True,\\\\\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No current account \\\\u2014 selecting best (score {best_score:.0f})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    target_email=best.email,\\\\\\\\n                    target_remaining=best.remaining_percent,\\\\\\\\n                    current_email=current_email,\\\\\\\\n                    current_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n            return SwitchDecision(\\\\\\\\n                should_switch=False,\\\\\\\\n                reason=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No account quota available\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                target_email=None,\\\\\\\\n                target_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\n                current_email=current_email,\\\\\\\\n                current_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Score current account\\\\\\\\n        current_score = self._score_account(current_snapshot, is_current=True)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Score all candidates\\\\\\\\n        candidates = [s for s in all_snapshots if s.email != current_email]\\\\\\\\n        if not candidates:\\\\\\\\n            return SwitchDecision(\\\\\\\\n                should_switch=False,\\\\\\\\n                reason=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No other accounts available\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                target_email=None,\\\\\\\\n                target_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\n                current_email=current_email,\\\\\\\\n                current_remaining=current_snapshot.remaining_percent,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        scored = [(s, self._score_account(s)) for s in candidates]\\\\\\\\n        best_snapshot, best_score = max(scored, key=lambda x: x[1])\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        improvement = best_score - current_score\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Determine reason for decision\\\\\\\\n        if improvement > self.SWITCH_THRESHOLD:\\\\\\\\n            # Explain WHY we're switching\\\\\\\\n            reason_parts = []\\\\\\\\n            best_hours = best_snapshot.time_until_reset_hours\\\\\\\\n            if (0 < best_hours <= self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS\\\\\\\\n                    and best_snapshot.remaining_percent > 0):\\\\\\\\n                reason_parts.append(\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"waste prevention: {best_snapshot.remaining_percent}% expiring in {best_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n            if best_snapshot.remaining_percent > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD:\\\\\\\\n                reason_parts.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task-safe ({best_snapshot.remaining_percent}% remaining)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            if self._is_fresh_reset(best_snapshot):\\\\\\\\n                reason_parts.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fresh reset ({best_snapshot.remaining_percent}%)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            reason = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"; \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(reason_parts) if reason_parts else f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"better score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            reason += f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (score {current_score:.0f} \\\\u2192 {best_score:.0f}, \\\\u0394{improvement:.0f})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            return SwitchDecision(\\\\\\\\n                should_switch=True,\\\\\\\\n                reason=reason,\\\\\\\\n                target_email=best_snapshot.email,\\\\\\\\n                target_remaining=best_snapshot.remaining_percent,\\\\\\\\n                current_email=current_email,\\\\\\\\n                current_remaining=current_snapshot.remaining_percent,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Stay \\\\u2014 explain why\\\\\\\\n        if current_snapshot.remaining_percent > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD:\\\\\\\\n            reason = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Current quota healthy ({current_snapshot.remaining_percent}% remaining)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        else:\\\\\\\\n            reason = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No significant improvement (\\\\u0394{improvement:.0f}, need >{self.SWITCH_THRESHOLD})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return SwitchDecision(\\\\\\\\n            should_switch=False,\\\\\\\\n            reason=reason,\\\\\\\\n            target_email=None,\\\\\\\\n            target_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\n            current_email=current_email,\\\\\\\\n            current_remaining=current_snapshot.remaining_percent,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def check_and_switch_if_needed(self) -> SwitchDecision:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        Check all account quotas and switch if necessary.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        Returns: SwitchDecision with details about action taken.\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        now = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Rate limit checks (no more than once per check_interval)\\\\\\\\n        if now - self.last_check_time < self.check_interval_minutes * 60:\\\\\\\\n            return SwitchDecision(\\\\\\\\n                should_switch=False,\\\\\\\\n                reason=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Check rate limited (next in {self.check_interval_minutes}min)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                target_email=None,\\\\\\\\n                target_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\n                current_email=None,\\\\\\\\n                current_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        self.last_check_time = now\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Fetch all quotas\\\\\\\\n        snapshots = self.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\\\\\n        if not snapshots:\\\\\\\\n            return SwitchDecision(\\\\\\\\n                should_switch=False,\\\\\\\\n                reason=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No accounts found\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                target_email=None,\\\\\\\\n                target_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\n                current_email=None,\\\\\\\\n                current_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Determine current active account\\\\\\\\n        current_email: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\n        current_snapshot: Optional[QuotaSnapshot] = None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Try to get Codex active account\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            codex_email = get_active_codex_email()\\\\\\\\n            if codex_email:\\\\\\\\n                current_email = codex_email\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            pass\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Try to get Google active account if no Codex\\\\\\\\n        if not current_email:\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                google_email = get_active_google_email()\\\\\\\\n                if google_email:\\\\\\\\n                    current_email = google_email\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\n                pass\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Find current snapshot\\\\\\\\n        if current_email:\\\\\\\\n            for snapshot in snapshots:\\\\\\\\n                if snapshot.email == current_email:\\\\\\\\n                    current_snapshot = snapshot\\\\\\\\n                    break\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Analyze and decide\\\\\\\\n        decision = self.analyze_and_decide(current_email or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", current_snapshot, snapshots)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # Execute switch if needed\\\\\\\\n        if decision.should_switch and decision.target_email:\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                # Determine which provider the target belongs to\\\\\\\\n                target_snapshot = next(s for s in snapshots if s.email == decision.target_email)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                if target_snapshot.provider == Provider.CODEX:\\\\\\\\n                    set_active_codex_account(decision.target_email)\\\\\\\\n                else:  # GOOGLE\\\\\\\\n                    set_active_google_account(decision.target_email)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                self.last_switch_time = now\\\\\\\\n                decision.reason += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" [SWITCHED]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n                print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Switch error: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n                decision.reason += f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" [SWITCH FAILED: {e}]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return decision\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef print_quota_report(snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot], manager: Optional[QuotaManager] = None) -> None:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Print formatted quota report for all accounts.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not snapshots:\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No accounts found.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        return\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    w = 120\\\\\\\\n    print()\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2554\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * w + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2557\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2551 QUOTA STATUS REPORT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".ljust(w + 2) + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2563\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2551 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".ljust(40)\\\\\\\\n \\\\u2551\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u255f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2500\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * w + snapshot.remaining_percent\\\\\\\\n        filled = int(remaining / 5)\\\\\\\\n        bar = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2588\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * filled) + (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2591\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * (20 - filled)) + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        icon = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\ud83d\\\\udfe2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if remaining > 40 else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\ud83d\\\\udfe1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if remaining > 5 else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\ud83d\\\\udd34\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        score_str = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" {snapshot.provider.value:>8} \\\\u2551\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        print(line)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u255a\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + scripts/orchestra_cli.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_22\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,280p' scripts/orchestra_cli.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"#!/usr/bin/env python3\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Interactive CLI for running multi-agent orchestrator workflows.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport argparse\\\\\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\nimport logging\\\\\\\\nimport re\\\\\\\\nimport sys\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport uuid\\\\\\\\nimport yaml\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Fix path to allow importing from the project root if run from anywhere\\\\\\\\nsys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent.parent.absolute()))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom common.acp_client import ACPClient\\\\\\\\nfrom common.models import Message, MessagePart, RunStatus\\\\\\\\nfrom scripts.check_server_status import check_all_servers, StatusReport\\\\\\\\nfrom orchestrator.pipeline import PipelineDefinition, PipelineExecutor, PipelineError\\\\\\\\nfrom orchestrator.stage import StageDefinition, StageResult\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Setup minimal logging, only warning+ so it doesn't clutter CLI\\\\\\\\nlogging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING, format=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%(message)s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef hide_code_blocks(text: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Replaces markdown code blocks and diffs with a hidden placeholder.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not text:\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    # Regex to match ```language \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n code... \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n ```\\\\\\\\n    pattern = re.compile(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"```[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\S]*?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", re.MULTILINE)\\\\\\\\n    return pattern.sub(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[CODE DIFF/BLOCK HIDDEN]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", text)\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass CLIExecutor(PipelineExecutor):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Custom executor that streams updates to the CLI interface and routes to ACP services.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, pipeline_def: PipelineDefinition, config_path: str):\\\\\\\\n        super().__init__(pipeline_def)\\\\\\\\n        self.session_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:12]\\\\\\\\n        self.clients: dict[str, ACPClient] = {}\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        with open(config_path, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\\\\\n            data = yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\\\\\n            for name, info in data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agents\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).items():\\\\\\\\n                self.clients[name] = ACPClient(info[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"base_url\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\n    async def cleanup(self):\\\\\\\\n        import asyncio\\\\\\\\n        await asyncio.gather(*(client.close() for client in self.clients.values()), return_exceptions=True)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def _invoke_model(self, stage_def: StageDefinition, prompt: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\n        agent_name = stage_def.metadata.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        if not agent_name:\\\\\\\\n            return await super()._invoke_model(stage_def, prompt)\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n        client = self.clients.get(agent_name)\\\\\\\\n        if not client:\\\\\\\\n            raise ValueError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Unknown agent '{agent_name}' configured in metadata for stage {stage_def.stage_id}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n        message = Message(\\\\\\\\n            role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            parts=[MessagePart(content=prompt)]\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        run = await client.create_run(agent_name, [message], session_id=self.session_id)\\\\\\\\n        if run.status != RunStatus.COMPLETED:\\\\\\\\n            raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Agent {agent_name} failed: {run.error}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n        if not run.output_messages:\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        return run.output_messages[0].text\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    async def _execute_stage(self, stage_def: StageDefinition) -> StageResult:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Override to provide CLI feedback before and after the stage.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n========================================================\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\ud83d\\\\udd04 CURRENT STEP: {stage_def.name} ({stage_def.stage_id})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\ud83e\\\\udd16 Agent Model:  {stage_def.model}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"========================================================\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        # Prepare prompt to show user what is being asked\\\\\\\\n        prompt = self._prepare_prompt(stage_def)\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[Input] -> Sending to Agent:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\n        # We don't hide code blocks in prompt for context, but we can limit size\\\\\\\\n        short_prompt = prompt if len(prompt) < 1000 else prompt[:500] + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n...[TRUNCATED FOR DISPLAY]...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + prompt[-500:]\\\\\\\\n        print(short_prompt)\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\u23f3 Waiting for agent response...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        start_time = time.time()\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            output = await self._invoke_model(stage_def, prompt)\\\\\\\\n            execution_time = time.time() - start_time\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2705 Agent responded in {execution_time:.1f}s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[Output] <- Received from Agent:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n            # Hide code blocks for clean UI\\\\\\\\n            clean_output = hide_code_blocks(output)\\\\\\\\n            print(clean_output)\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n            return StageResult(\\\\\\\\n                stage_id=stage_def.stage_id,\\\\\\\\n                status=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                output=output,\\\\\\\\n                raw_output=output,\\\\\\\\n                execution_time=execution_time,\\\\\\\\n                model_used=stage_def.model,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n        except Exception as exc:\\\\\\\\n            execution_time = time.time() - start_time\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u274c Stage failed after {execution_time:.1f}s: {exc}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            raise  # Let the base class intercept it and handle fail_fast\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync def ensure_servers_running(config_path: str, timeout: float = 3.0) -> bool:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Check if required servers are healthy. Return True if all ok.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\ud83d\\\\udd0d Checking ACP Server Status...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    report = await check_all_servers(config_path, timeout)\\\\\\\\n    if report.unhealthy_count == 0:\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2705 All {report.total_servers} servers are healthy!\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\u274c SOME SERVERS ARE UNREACHABLE!\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    for server in report.servers:\\\\\\\\n        if not server.healthy:\\\\\\\\n            err = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ({server.error})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if server.error else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  - {server.base_url} is DOWN{err}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nPlease start the required servers (e.g. using scripts/run_*_server.py).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    return False\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_available_workflows() -> list[Path]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return a list of workflow YAML files.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    workflows_dir = Path(__file__).parent.parent / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"workflows\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not workflows_dir.exists():\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    return sorted(workflows_dir.glob(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*.yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync def main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:\\\\\\\\n    # 1. Check Servers\\\\\\\\n    servers_ok = await ensure_servers_running(args.config, args.timeout)\\\\\\\\n    if not servers_ok:\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"               ORCHESTRA MULTI-AGENT CLI\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60 + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    # 2. Select Workflow\\\\\\\\n    workflows = get_available_workflows()\\\\\\\\n    if not workflows:\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u274c No workflows found in the 'workflows/' directory.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n    workflow_path = None\\\\\\\\n    if args.workflow:\\\\\\\\n        workflow_path = Path(args.workflow)\\\\\\\\n        if not workflow_path.exists():\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u274c Workflow {workflow_path} not found.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\n    else:\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Available Workflows:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        for idx, wf in enumerate(workflows):\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  [{idx + 1}] {wf.name}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                choice = input(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSelect a workflow (1-%d): \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" % len(workflows))\\\\\\\\n                idx = int(choice.strip()) - 1\\\\\\\\n                if 0 <= idx < len(workflows):\\\\\\\\n                    workflow_path = workflows[idx]\\\\\\\\n                    break\\\\\\\\n                else:\\\\\\\\n                    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Invalid choice.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            except ValueError:\\\\\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Please enter a number.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCanceled by user.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\u2705 Selected workflow: {workflow_path.name}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    # Load pipeline\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        pipeline_def = PipelineDefinition(workflow_path)\\\\\\\\n    except PipelineError as e:\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u274c Failed to load pipeline: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n    # 3. Get Task\\\\\\\\n    task_description = args.task\\\\\\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nEnter task description (press Enter twice to finish):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        lines = []\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                line = input()\\\\\\\\n                if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\\\\\n                    break\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(line)\\\\\\\\n            except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCanceled by user.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\\\\\n        task_description = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u274c Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    # 4. Execute Pipeline\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\ud83d\\\\ude80 Starting Pipeline Execution...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    executor = CLIExecutor(pipeline_def, args.config)\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        # Also map user_task so it's available for workflows explicitly requesting it\\\\\\\\n        initial_state = {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user_task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task_description}\\\\\\\\n        results = await executor.execute(task_description, initial_state=initial_state)\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\ud83c\\\\udf89 PIPELINE EXECUTION COMPLETED\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\\\\\n        for stage_id, result in results.items():\\\\\\\\n            icon = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u2705\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if result.status == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\u274c\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{icon} Stage '{stage_id}': {result.status.upper()} ({result.execution_time:.1f}s)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n        # Check for absolute failure\\\\\\\\n        if any(r.status == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for r in results.values()):\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\u274c Pipeline completed with ERRORS.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\u274c Pipeline execution failed due to an error: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        import traceback\\\\\\\\n        traceback.print_exc()\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\n    finally:\\\\\\\\n        await executor.cleanup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef main() -> None:\\\\\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Interactive Multi-Agent Orchestrator CLI\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--config\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", default=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"config/agents.yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Path to agents.yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--timeout\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", type=float, default=3.0, help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Per-server health check timeout in seconds\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--workflow\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Path to a specific workflow YAML, bypasses selection\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Initial task description, bypasses input dialog\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    args = parser.parse_args()\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        asyncio.run(main_async(args))\\\\\\\\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nExiting CLI...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(0)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n    main()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_23\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/db.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_23\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/db.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SQLite schema and connection helpers for the harness.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport sqlite3\\\\\\\\nfrom contextlib import contextmanager\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Iterator\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nSCHEMA = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nPRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (\\\\\\\\n    task_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n    title TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    description TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    goal TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    complexity TEXT DEFAULT 'medium',\\\\\\\\n    priority INTEGER DEFAULT 50,\\\\\\\\n    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',\\\\\\\\n    working_dir TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stages (\\\\\\\\n    stage_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n    task_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(task_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    stage_type TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    stage_order INTEGER NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    model_role TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    assigned_model TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    assigned_provider TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',\\\\\\\\n    handoff_doc_path TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    result_summary TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    token_used INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n    duration_sec REAL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n    started_at TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    finished_at TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    metadata TEXT DEFAULT '{}'\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_requests (\\\\\\\\n    request_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n    stage_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stages(stage_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    action TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    context TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    risk_level TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    decision TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    voters TEXT DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    decided_at TEXT\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quota_events (\\\\\\\\n    event_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n    provider TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    account_email TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    event_type TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    details TEXT DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\n    created_at TEXT NOT NULL\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_status_priority\\\\\\\\n    ON tasks(status, priority DESC, created_at ASC);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_order\\\\\\\\n    ON stages(task_id, stage_order ASC);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_status\\\\\\\\n    ON stages(task_id, status, stage_order ASC);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass HarnessDB:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Small wrapper around a SQLite database file.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, db_path: str | Path) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        self.db_path = Path(db_path)\\\\\\\\n        self.db_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\n        self.initialize()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def initialize(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\n        with self.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            conn.executescript(SCHEMA)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    @contextmanager\\\\\\\\n    def connect(self) -> Iterator[sqlite3.Connection]:\\\\\\\\n        conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_path)\\\\\\\\n        conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            yield conn\\\\\\\\n            conn.commit()\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            conn.rollback()\\\\\\\\n            raise\\\\\\\\n        finally:\\\\\\\\n            conn.close()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_24\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' tests/harness/test_stage_executor.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_24\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' tests/harness/test_stage_executor.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import asyncio\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import PermissionDecision, RiskLevel, StageRecord, StageStatus\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.permission_gate import PermissionGate\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.stage_executor import CommandExecution, PermissionBlockedError, StageExecutor\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass DummyPermissionGate:\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, decision):\\\\\\\\n        self.decision = decision\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def decide(self, command, **kwargs):\\\\\\\\n        return self.decision\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass DummyVoting:\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, decision):\\\\\\\\n        self.decision = decision\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def vote(self, **kwargs):\\\\\\\\n        return self.decision\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync def _runner(command, cwd):\\\\\\\\n    return CommandExecution(returncode=0, stdout=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ok\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", stderr=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef make_stage(provider: str, metadata=None) -> StageRecord:\\\\\\\\n    return StageRecord(\\\\\\\\n        stage_id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        task_id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        stage_type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github_ops\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        stage_order=1,\\\\\\\\n        model_role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github_ops\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"coder\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        assigned_model=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-5.4-codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        assigned_provider=provider,\\\\\\\\n        status=StageStatus.PENDING,\\\\\\\\n        handoff_doc_path=None,\\\\\\\\n        result_summary=None,\\\\\\\\n        token_used=0,\\\\\\\\n        duration_sec=0.0,\\\\\\\\n        started_at=None,\\\\\\\\n        finished_at=None,\\\\\\\\n        metadata=metadata or {},\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef test_stage_executor_runs_github_commands(tmp_path) -> None:\\\\\\\\n    handoff = tmp_path / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"handoff.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    handoff.write_text(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"hello\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    executor = StageExecutor(\\\\\\\\n        permission_gate=DummyPermissionGate(\\\\\\\\n            PermissionDecision(risk_level=RiskLevel.MODERATE, decision=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"auto_approved\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", reason=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ok\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n        runner=_runner,\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    result = asyncio.run(\\\\\\\\n        executor.execute(\\\\\\\\n            make_stage(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"commands\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"echo pushed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]}),\\\\\\\\n            str(handoff),\\\\\\\\n            str(tmp_path),\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    assert result.status == StageStatus.DONE\\\\\\\\n    assert result.summary == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ok\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef test_stage_executor_blocks_unapproved_command(tmp_path) -> None:\\\\\\\\n    handoff = tmp_path / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"handoff.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    handoff.write_text(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"hello\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    executor = StageExecutor(\\\\\\\\n        permission_gate=DummyPermissionGate(\\\\\\\\n            PermissionDecision(\\\\\\\\n                risk_level=RiskLevel.DANGEROUS,\\\\\\\\n                decision=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"needs_user_approval\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                reason=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"blocked\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n        runner=_runner,\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        asyncio.run(executor.run_verify_cmd(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"git push origin main\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", str(tmp_path)))\\\\\\\\n    except PermissionBlockedError as exc:\\\\\\\\n        assert \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"blocked\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in str(exc)\\\\\\\\n        assert \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"git push origin main\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in exc.command\\\\\\\\n    else:\\\\\\\\n        raise AssertionError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Expected PermissionBlockedError\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef test_stage_executor_checks_raw_verify_command(tmp_path) -> None:\\\\\\\\n    from harness.models import ModelVote, VoteResult\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async def user_approver(command: str, context: str):\\\\\\\\n        return False\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    executor = StageExecutor(\\\\\\\\n        permission_gate=PermissionGate(\\\\\\\\n            voting=DummyVoting(\\\\\\\\n                VoteResult(\\\\\\\\n                    decision=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"REJECT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    votes=[ModelVote(model=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-5.4-codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", vote=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"REJECT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", reason=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"blocked\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")],\\\\\\\\n                    unanimous=True,\\\\\\\\n                    needs_escalation=True,\\\\\\\\n
