-lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,240p' artifacts/9198447474234958b318e2ef1de5cfe2/01_plan_output.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# Output: plan\\\\\\\\n## Summary\\\\\\\\nImplement the robustness work in three slices, keeping `QuotaRouter` selection pure and pushing all operational side effects into the harness runtime / CLI layer.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. Codex account rotation\\\\\\\\n- Keep `QuotaRouter.select_model()` and `can_run_stage()` side-effect free.\\\\\\\\n- Change Codex candidate selection from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"best provider snapshot\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" to \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"best eligible Codex account snapshot\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", using the existing use-it-or-lose-it score.\\\\\\\\n- Preserve the chosen `account_email` on the selected stage, preferably in stage metadata if the DB schema should stay stable.\\\\\\\\n- Add an explicit pre-execution Codex activation step that calls `models.codex.account.get_active_email()` and `set_active_account()` only when the chosen account differs.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n2. Daemon lifecycle\\\\\\\\n- Use the harness CLI in [harness/main.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/main.py) as the management entrypoint, not the older workflow CLI in [scripts/orchestra_cli.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/scripts/orchestra_cli.py).\\\\\\\\n- Add `daemon start`, `daemon stop`, `daemon status`, plus a hidden worker subcommand that runs `Harness.run_forever()`.\\\\\\\\n- Prefer a portable detached `subprocess.Popen(..., start_new_session=True)` / nohup-style path for tests instead of systemd-specific logic.\\\\\\\\n- Persist PID metadata, detect stale PID files, and handle `SIGTERM` so the loop exits cleanly after the current iteration.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3. Logging, monitoring, and dashboard\\\\\\\\n- Add centralized logging setup for harness CLI + daemon startup.\\\\\\\\n- Emit structured JSONL stage events for start, success, retry, quota pause, permission pause, and terminal failure.\\\\\\\\n- Reuse persisted `stages.token_used` and `stages.duration_sec` for aggregates; parse provider output for token usage where available and leave `0` when unavailable.\\\\\\\\n- Add a `dashboard` command that combines DB state, quota/permission audit tables, daemon state, and recent JSONL events into one status summary.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Key File Targets\\\\\\\\n- [harness/quota_router.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/quota_router.py)\\\\\\\\n- [harness/main.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/main.py)\\\\\\\\n- [harness/stage_executor.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/stage_executor.py)\\\\\\\\n- [harness/task_queue.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/task_queue.py)\\\\\\\\n- [models/codex/account.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/models/codex/account.py)\\\\\\\\n- [config/settings.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/config/settings.py)\\\\\\\\n- New modules are justified for daemon management and telemetry aggregation.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Risks To Avoid\\\\\\\\n- Do not let quota feasibility checks mutate global Codex auth state.\\\\\\\\n- Do not add daemon logic to the legacy orchestrator CLI; keep it on the harness path.\\\\\\\\n- Do not rely on live systemd in tests; use deterministic unit seams around PID files, signals, and subprocess launch.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Test Plan\\\\\\\\n- Extend router tests for multi-account Codex ranking and no-side-effect feasibility checks.\\\\\\\\n- Add harness tests for Codex account activation before a Codex stage executes.\\\\\\\\n- Add daemon tests for PID lifecycle, stale PID cleanup, and graceful stop/status behavior.\\\\\\\\n- Add telemetry/dashboard tests for JSONL emission and aggregate summaries.\\\\\\\\n- Final verification: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v`\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Baseline\\\\\\\\nCurrent baseline is green: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -q` passed with `21 passed`.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_33\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' artifacts/9198447474234958b318e2ef1de5cfe2/02_code_handoff.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_33\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' artifacts/9198447474234958b318e2ef1de5cfe2/02_code_handoff.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# Handoff: plan -> code\\\\\\\\n## Task\\\\\\\\nPhase 4: \\\\u5065\\\\u58ee\\\\u6027 for code-orchestra harness\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Context Gathered\\\\\\\\n- `QuotaRouter` currently collapses each provider to a single best snapshot in [harness/quota_router.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/quota_router.py), which is not enough for Codex multi-account rotation.\\\\\\\\n- `Harness._run_stage()` in [harness/main.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/main.py) persists model/provider selection but has no Codex account activation, no daemon hooks, and no telemetry hooks.\\\\\\\\n- `models.codex.account.set_active_account()` already handles token refresh + auth file switching in [models/codex/account.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/models/codex/account.py); the harness should integrate it as a runtime step, not from the router.\\\\\\\\n- `StageExecutionResult` already has `token_used` and `duration_sec`, and the stages table already persists both via [harness/task_queue.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/task_queue.py).\\\\\\\\n- Baseline verification is green: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -q` => `21 passed`.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Recommended Implementation Order\\\\\\\\n1. Codex rotation\\\\\\\\n- Update router eligibility/fallback logic so Codex models consider all eligible Codex snapshots, keeping the chosen `account_email`.\\\\\\\\n- Persist the selected account on the stage.\\\\\\\\n- Add a small helper in the harness path to activate the selected Codex account just before execution.\\\\\\\\n- Add tests first for router ranking, then for harness-side activation.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n2. Daemon mode\\\\\\\\n- Add a dedicated daemon helper module with PID file read/write, process liveness checks, start/stop/status, and stale PID cleanup.\\\\\\\\n- Extend the harness parser with `daemon` and a hidden worker command.\\\\\\\\n- Add `SIGTERM`-aware stop handling around `run_forever`, ideally with an `asyncio.Event` / shutdown flag seam that is easy to unit test.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3. Telemetry + dashboard\\\\\\\\n- Add centralized logging config and a JSONL event writer module.\\\\\\\\n- Emit stage lifecycle events from the harness runtime, not from the router.\\\\\\\\n- Add a dashboard summary builder that reads DB state + event log + daemon status.\\\\\\\\n- Expose it via `dashboard` in the harness CLI.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Concrete Guidance\\\\\\\\n- Prefer stage metadata for the selected Codex account instead of widening the DB schema unless a wider schema clearly improves readability.\\\\\\\\n- Keep `can_run_stage()` pure; it is called from paused-task recovery and should not switch accounts.\\\\\\\\n- Parse token usage opportunistically in [harness/stage_executor.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/stage_executor.py); do not block this phase on provider-specific token support.\\\\\\\\n- Treat [scripts/orchestra_cli.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/scripts/orchestra_cli.py) as unrelated legacy workflow UI unless you discover a hard requirement otherwise.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Verification Target\\\\\\\\nRun `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v` after each slice if possible, then once at the end.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\"}}\\\\n{\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item.updated\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"item_27\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"todo_list\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"items\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"Inspect -lc \\\"sed -n '1,240p' artifacts/83b2ef3d77cf4f508fdea0bd372794e7/02_code_handoff.md\\\"\",\"aggregated_output\":\"# Handoff: plan -> code\\n## Task\\nPhase 4: 健壮性 for code-orchestra harness\\n\\n## Context Gathered\\n- [harness/quota_router.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/quota_router.py) 当前按 provider 取单个最佳 quota snapshot；这会丢掉 Codex 的账号级选择空间。\\n- [harness/main.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/main.py) 当前只持久化 `assigned_model` / `assigned_provider`，执行前没有 Codex 账号激活，也没有 daemon / telemetry hook。\\n- [harness/task_queue.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/task_queue.py) 已经有 `metadata` 字段，但缺少单独的 metadata 更新接口；这是保存 `account_email` 的最小改动点。\\n- [harness/stage_executor.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/harness/stage_executor.py) 已经返回 `duration_sec` / `token_used`，其中 `token_used` 目前始终接近未使用状态，适合在这里补 provider 输出解析。\\n- [models/codex/account.py](/home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra/models/codex/account.py) 已提供 `get_active_email()` 和 `set_active_account()`；账号切换副作用应放到 runtime，而不是 router。\\n- 当前基线: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v` 通过，结果是 `21 passed`。\\n\\n## Recommended Order\\n1. 先做 Codex 轮换\\n- router 改成账号级候选。\\n- stage metadata 持久化 `selected_account_email`。\\n- `Harness._run_stage()` 在真正执行前切换 Codex 账号。\\n- 先补 router 和 harness 测试，再动实现。\\n\\n2. 再做 daemon\\n- 新建 daemon helper 模块，不要把 PID/信号逻辑塞满 `main.py`。\\n- parser 增加 `daemon` 子命令和内部 worker 子命令。\\n- `run_forever()` 增加可优雅退出的 stop seam。\\n\\n3. 最后做 telemetry 和 dashboard\\n- 统一 logging 配置。\\n- stage 生命周期事件写 JSONL。\\n- `dashboard` 聚合 DB + daemon + recent events。\\n\\n## Concrete Guidance\\n- `QuotaRouter.can_run_stage()` 必须保持无副作用，因为它会在 paused quota 恢复逻辑中反复调用。\\n- `TaskQueue.assign_stage_model()` 很可能需要扩成同时支持 metadata patch，或者新增 `update_stage_metadata()`。\\n- daemon 测试应 mock `Popen`、`os.kill(pid, 0)` 或等价存活检查，避免真实后台进程依赖。\\n- `dashboard` 不必做复杂 TUI，先输出稳定 JSON/结构化文本即可。\\n\\n## Verification Target\\n收尾时运行: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v`\\n\",\"exit_code\":0,\"status\":\"completed\"}}\n./artifacts/34ef9bd3ec734e22abcab52cc3603f96/01_plan_output.md:83:{\"type\":\"item.completed\",\"item\":{\"id\":\"item_39\",\"type\":\"agent_message\",\"text\":\"计划阶段已完成，产物已写入 {"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_11","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' harness/handoff.py\"","aggregated_output":"\"\"\"Handoff document generation and artifact storage.\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Iterable\n\nfrom harness.models import StageExecutionResult, StageRecord, TaskRecord\n\n\nclass HandoffProtocol:\n    \"\"\"Persist stage inputs and outputs as markdown artifacts.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, artifact_root: str | Path = \"artifacts\") -> None:\n        self.artifact_root = Path(artifact_root)\n        self.artifact_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n\n    def task_dir(self, task_id: str) -> Path:\n        path = self.artifact_root / task_id\n        path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        return path\n\n    def handoff_path(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> Path:\n        return self.task_dir(task.task_id) / f\"{stage.stage_order:02d}_{stage.stage_type}_handoff.md\"\n\n    def output_path(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> Path:\n        return self.task_dir(task.task_id) / f\"{stage.stage_order:02d}_{stage.stage_type}_output.md\"\n\n    def generate(\n        self,\n        task: TaskRecord,\n        stage: StageRecord,\n        previous_stages: Iterable[StageRecord],\n    ) -> str:\n        previous = list(previous_stages)\n        previous_stage_name = previous[-1].stage_type if previous else \"bootstrap\"\n\n        lines = [\n            f\"# Handoff: {previous_stage_name} -> {stage.stage_type}\",\n            \"## Task\",\n            task.title,\n            \"\",\n            \"## Description\",\n            task.description,\n            \"\",\n        ]\n\n        if task.goal:\n            lines.extend([\"## Goal\", task.goal, \"\"])\n\n        lines.extend(\n            [\n                \"## Context\",\n                f\"- Complexity: {task.complexity}\",\n                f\"- Current Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\",\n                f\"- Working Directory: {task.working_dir or '.'}\",\n                \"\",\n            ]\n        )\n\n        if previous:\n            lines.append(\"## Previous Stage Output\")\n            for previous_stage in previous:\n                summary = previous_stage.result_summary or \"No summary recorded.\"\n                lines.extend(\n                    [\n                        f\"### {previous_stage.stage_type}\",\n                        summary.strip(),\n                        \"\",\n                    ]\n                )\n\n        lines.append(\"## Current Stage Instructions\")\n        instruction = stage.metadata.get(\"instructions\") if stage.metadata else None\n        if instruction:\n            lines.append(str(instruction).strip())\n        else:\n            lines.append(\n                f\"Complete the `{stage.stage_type}` stage for this task in `{task.working_dir or '.'}`.\"\n            )\n        lines.append(\"\")\n\n        verify_cmd = stage.verify_cmd or task.verify_cmd\n        if verify_cmd:\n            lines.extend([\"## Verification\", f\"Run: `{verify_cmd}`\", \"\"])\n\n        return \"\\n\".join(lines).rstrip() + \"\\n\"\n\n    def write_handoff(\n        self,\n        task: TaskRecord,\n        stage: StageRecord,\n        previous_stages: Iterable[StageRecord],\n    ) -> Path:\n        content = self.generate(task, stage, previous_stages)\n        path = self.handoff_path(task, stage)\n        path.write_text(content, encoding=\"utf-8\")\n        return path\n\n    def save_stage_output(\n        self,\n        task: TaskRecord,\n        stage: StageRecord,\n        result: StageExecutionResult,\n    ) -> Path:\n        path = self.output_path(task, stage)\n        lines = [\n            f\"# Output: {stage.stage_type}\",\n            \"## Summary\",\n            result.summary or \"No summary generated.\",\n            \"\",\n        ]\n        if result.files_changed:\n            lines.append(\"## Files Changed\")\n            lines.extend(f\"- {path_item}\" for path_item in result.files_changed)\n            lines.append(\"\")\n        if result.raw_output:\n            lines.extend([\"## Raw Output\", \"```text\", result.raw_output.rstrip(), \"```\", \"\"])\n        path.write_text(\"\\n\".join(lines).rstrip() + \"\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n        return path\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
